title: Education Franchise Business Development Manager
description:
Business Development Executive

Franchise & Licensing Growth  •  Remote  •  Full-Time



Department	Franchise & Licensing

Reports To	Head of Partnerships / CEO

Location	Remote (anywhere) — occasional travel may be required

Employment Type	Full-Time

Experience Required	Minimum 2 years in B2B sales, business development, or education industry



ABOUT RIPPLE CREATE

Ripple Create is a coding and robotics academy dedicated to nurturing the next generation of innovators, aged 5 to 18. Through hands-on, curriculum-aligned programmes, we empower young learners to design, build, and code — preparing them for a technology-driven future. We are rapidly expanding our reach through franchise and licensing partnerships across the region and beyond.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a driven and self-motivated Business Development Executive to lead the growth of our franchise and licensing network. In this remote-based role, you will own the full partnership lifecycle — from generating and qualifying leads through marketing channels, to nurturing prospects, coordinating technical demonstrations, closing agreements, and supporting new partners through their first six months of operation. This is a high-impact, end-to-end commercial role ideal for someone with a passion for education and a proven track record in consultative sales.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Lead Generation & Marketing Channel Management

•	Manage and optimise franchise and licensing marketing portals, listings, and digital channels (e.g. franchise directories, social media, paid ads,
 campaigns).

•	Monitor inbound enquiries across all channels and respond promptly to maintain lead 
ntum.

•	Work with the marketing team to develop compelling collateral and messaging targeting prospective franchisees and licensees.



CRM Management & Lead Administration

•	Accurately enter, update, and maintain all leads and prospect interactions in the CRM system in a timely manner.

•	Track pipeline stages, flag at-risk leads, and maintain a clean, up-to-date database.

•	Generate regular reports on lead volume, conversion rates, and pipeline health for management review.



Lead Nurturing, Qualification & Sales Process

•	Proactively nurture prospects through personalised outreach, follow-up calls,
s, and virtual meetings.

•	Qualify leads against defined criteria (financial capacity, market fit, operational readiness) to prioritise pipeline.

•	Guide prospects through the sales journey, addressing objections and providing relevant information and case studies.

•	Coordinate and schedule technical demonstrations with the Sales Trainer, ensuring prospects are well-prepared and engaged.

•	Follow through on all stages of the deal process, working collaboratively toward signed agreements.



Post-Sales Partner Support (First 6 Months)

•	Serve as the primary point of contact for new franchise and licensing partners from signing through the first six months of operations.

•	Coordinate onboarding activities, training schedules, and resource access with internal teams.

•	Proactively check in with partners to resolve issues, gather feedback, and ensure a smooth launch.

•	Facilitate a structured handover to the Account Manager at the end of the six-month post-sales period.



REQUIREMENTS

•	Experience: Minimum 2 years of experience in B2B sales, business development, franchise development, or a related field; experience in the education sector is a strong advantage.

•	Sales Acumen: Demonstrated ability to manage a full sales cycle from lead generation to closing, with a consultative, relationship-first approach.

•	CRM Proficiency: Hands-on experience using CRM platforms (e.g. HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, or similar); disciplined in data entry and pipeline management.

•	Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English; ability to adapt tone and style for diverse stakeholders.

•	Organised & Self-Directed: Highly organised with strong time management skills; comfortable managing multiple prospects and tasks independently in a remote environment.

•	Tech Savvy: Comfortable with digital marketing channels, video conferencing tools, and productivity software.

•	Passion for Education: Genuine interest in children’s education, STEM, or technology learning programmes.



NICE TO HAVE

•	Experience in franchise development, licensing, or channel partnerships.

•	Background or network in the K-12 education, enrichment, or EdTech space.

•	Familiarity with coding, robotics, or STEM-related products or curricula.

•	Multilingual abilities to engage prospects across different markets.



WHAT WE OFFER

•	A fully remote, flexible work arrangement with a results-driven culture.

•	A meaningful role contributing to the growth of quality STEM education globally.

•	Competitive base salary with performance-based commissions and incentives.

•	Supportive team, clear processes, and the tools you need to succeed.

•	Opportunities for career growth as the franchise and licensing network expands.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your CV and a brief cover letter explaining why you’re excited about this role. Please include the subject line: “BD Manager — Franchise & Licensing”. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer
description:
Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer







Remote-Based  |  Occasional Travel Required  |  Part-Time / Contract





About Our Company :



We are the leading Coding and Robotics Education Academy in Singapore. Our passion and mission is in teaching the children of today, the skills of tomorrow, and have fun learning it !



About the Role : 



We are seeking a passionate and experienced Coding & Robotics Education Trainer to support our growing network of licensees. The successful candidate will be responsible for training our licensee partners who have adopted our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are well-equipped to deliver high-quality STEM education programs.



This role is primarily remote-based, with occasional travel required for training sessions, workshops, or partner support.



You will empower our licensees with the knowledge, skills, and confidence to deliver our coding and robotics curriculum effectively to children aged 5 to 14 years old. You will also play a key role in keeping our curriculum fresh, relevant, and engaging by updating existing materials and developing new content as our programmes evolve.



Key Responsibilities :



•	Train and onboard new licensees on our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are equipped to deliver high-quality lessons.

•	Conduct training workshops and sessions for licensee educators, both virtually and in-person as required.

•	Provide ongoing coaching, mentoring, and support to licensees post-training.

•	Evaluate licensee competency and readiness to deliver the curriculum independently.

•	Review, update, and improve existing curriculum materials to ensure they remain current and effective.

•	Develop new curriculum modules and lesson plans aligned with industry trends and educational best practices.

•	Collaborate with the curriculum and product teams to align training delivery with programme goals.

•	Gather feedback from licensees and learners to continuously improve training programmes.

•	Maintain comprehensive training documentation, guides, and resources.

•	Travel occasionally to licensee locations for in-person training, support, and quality assurance.



Who We Are Looking For :



We are seeking someone who combines a love for education technology with real-world teaching experience. The ideal candidate:

•	Has proven experience training adults in a professional or educational setting.

•	Has hands-on experience teaching or working with children between the ages of 5 and 14 years old.

•	Holds a background in coding, robotics, STEM education, or a closely related field.

•	Is comfortable using and teaching tools such as Scratch, Python, block-based coding platforms, or robotics kits (e.g., LEGO Mindstorms, mBot, or similar).

•	Demonstrates strong curriculum development and instructional design skills.

•	Is an excellent communicator — able to simplify complex technical concepts for varied audiences.

•	Is self-driven, organised, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

•	Is flexible and willing to travel when required.



Qualifications & Experience :



•	Diploma or Degree in Education, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.

•	Minimum 2 years of teaching or training experience — experience with both children and adults is strongly preferred.

•	Current or former school teachers specialising in Computing, ICT, STEM, or related subjects are warmly encouraged to apply.

•	Experience in curriculum writing, lesson planning, or instructional design is a strong advantage.

•	Experience in a franchising or licensee-based education business is a bonus, but not required.

•	Proficiency in digital tools for remote training delivery (e.g., Zoom, Google Meet, LMS platforms).



What We Offer :



•	Flexible, remote-based working arrangement.

•	A meaningful role shaping the next generation of coders and innovators.

•	A collaborative and supportive team environment.

•	Opportunities for professional development and growth within the organisation.

•	Travel allowances for required in-person training engagements.

•	Competitive remuneration commensurate with experience.

title: Rent & Lease Coordinator (AppFolio + Section 8 REQUIRED)
description:

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based property management company managing 150+ rental units across New Jersey and continuing to scale. We are building a strong, reliable backend team and are looking for someone who can take ownership of rent tracking, lease management, and utilities.

IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING:

This role requires PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE with BOTH AppFolio AND Section 8 (Housing Vouchers).

If you do NOT have experience with:

AppFolio (or similar property management software)

Section 8 / Housing Voucher programs

???? Please do not apply. Applications without this experience will not be considered.

You will be responsible for maintaining accurate tenant ledgers, posting rent payments, managing lease renewals, tracking delinquency, and coordinating utilities.

This is a detail-heavy, numbers-focused role that requires accuracy and accountability.

1. AppFolio & Rent Management

Prepare accounts for eviction review

Send and follow up on lease renewals

Update rent increases in AppFolio

Maintain organized lease records

4. Move-In / Move-Out Coordination (Backend)

Confirm move-in requirements:

Lease signed

Security deposit paid

First month’s rent paid

Utilities transferred to tenant

Track move-outs and finalize accounts

5. Utilities Coordination

Ensure utilities are turned on/off correctly during move-in/move-out

Confirm utilities are placed in tenant’s name

Maintain a tracker for all utility accounts

6. Section 8 / Voucher Tracking (REQUIRED EXPERIENCE)

Track expected HAP payments

Identify missing or delayed payments

Maintain records of tenant vs voucher payments

7. Weekly Reporting

Provide a weekly report including:

Total rent collected

Outstanding balances

Delinquent tenants

Upcoming lease renewals

Requirements:

? MUST have AppFolio experience

? MUST have Section 8 / Housing Voucher experience

Strong attention to detail

Basic bookkeeping/accounting understanding

Excellent written English

Organized and reliable

Able to follow systems and work independently

Work Schedule:

Full-time (40 hours/week)

Must be available during U.S. business hours

Compensation:

$12 USD/hour (starting)

Opportunity for raises based on performance

How to Apply:

To be considered, include:

Your AppFolio experience (what tasks you handled)

Your Section 8 experience (what you managed)

Previous property management experience

Why you are a good fit for a detail-heavy role

Note:

This role requires accuracy and ownership. If you are someone who pays close attention to detail and takes pride in keeping systems organized and correct, we want to hear from you.

title: Short Form Organice Video editor
description:
I’m looking for a short form video editor to help me with a high volume of client content every week.



I run a content agency here in San Diego and we specialize in making real content for real businesses. Not cookie cutter stuff. My clients are in fitness and automotive right now 
 
 and I’ve got a few new accounts coming on as well.



There’s a lot of raw footage. The job is not just trimming clips. You need to be able to find the edit inside the footage. Pull the hook. Find the message. Make it flow. These are mostly Reels.



If you know how to use AI tools to speed things up that’s a huge plus. 



If you’ve used tools that help crank out edits faster without killing quality, I want to know.



Every week there will be new edits. This is ongoing work. We need to move fast. Sometimes I’ll send notes and we’ll adjust quickly. No ego. Just clean execution and fast turnaround.



You should be:

– Comfortable editing short form content

– Fast

– Organized

– Good with pacing and hooks

– Able to follow direction but also think creatively



Bonus if you understand fitness content or car content. and home remodels 



If you’re interested, send:

– Examples of short form edits

– What software you use

– What AI tools you use

– Your weekly availability



This is long term if it’s a good fit. I don’t need over complicated. I need someone solid who can execute.



Let’s build.

title: If You Only Edit Short-Form… Don’t Apply (Long-Form Editor Needed)
description:
Most video editors can’t do this.



And that’s not an insult…



It’s just reality.





If your entire skillset is:



- Adding captions

- Zoom cuts every 2 seconds

- Throwing random B-roll on top of talking heads

- Matching words to text like karaoke



This is NOT for you.



Seriously… don’t apply.





Because what we’re building requires a completely different brain.





What we actually need (read this twice):



In short someone who can edit like this:







We’re looking for a long-form video editor who can:



Zoom OUT before they zoom in



Understand the point of a video before touching the timeline



Edit with intention… not decoration



Tie every cut, visual, and pacing decision back to a bigger narrative



This is NOT about making things “more engaging” with noise.



This is about making things more compelling with structure.





Here’s the problem we keep running into…



Editors who come from short-form think:



“More visuals = better edit”



So what happens?



- Every sentence gets a caption

- Every 3 seconds gets a cut

- Every idea gets drowned in unnecessary B-roll



And the final product?



Feels busy… but empty.



Looks edited… but not thought through.



We don’t want that.





What great looks like to us:



You watch a 20-minute video…



And you’re not thinking about transitions or effects…



You’re locked into the story.



Everything feels intentional.



Every cut earns its place.



The pacing breathes.



And when it ends…



You remember the message.





This role is for you if:



You’ve edited long-form content (10+ minutes) like:



- YouTube videos

- Podcast videos



And more importantly…



You think in:



- Narrative arcs

- Retention flow

- Emotional pacing

- Information hierarchy



Not just:



- Effects

- Presets

- Templates





Damaging truth:



This kind of editing is slower.



It takes more thinking.



More rewatching.



More restraint.



BUT…



The end result is 10x more powerful…



And that’s what we care about.





What you’ll be responsible for:



Taking raw long-form footage and shaping it into a cohesive, compelling story



Making editing decisions based on the goal of the video… not habits



Enhancing clarity, flow, and retention without over-editing



Knowing when to add… and when to leave things alone





What we don’t care about:



- Fancy transitions

- Overused editing tricks

- How fast you can pump out clips





What we DO care about:



- Taste



- Judgment



- Restraint



- Storytelling ability



PS. You should be able to handle basic color grading inside DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut.



Nothing crazy…



But enough to make footage feel clean, consistent, and intentional.





How to apply (this is important):



Do NOT send us short-form edits.



We will ignore them.



Instead, send:



2–3 long-form projects (10+ minutes) you’ve edited



And tell us:



- What was the goal of the video?

- What editing decisions did you make to support that goal?

- What did you intentionally choose NOT to do… and why?





If you read this and thought:



“Finally… someone gets it.”



We want to see your work.





If you read this and thought:



“This seems like overthinking editing…”



This is not for you.





If this feels obvious to you…



You’re probably who we’re looking for.



Send your portfolio.

• Comfortable working with spreadsheets, pricing, and estimates

• Organized, dependable, and able to catch small errors

• Good written English and clear communication

• Willing to use Time Doctor during work hours

title: Privacy Operator
description:
This role is responsible for conducting privacy management tasks as it relates to the overall privacy objectives of the client. The privacy operators primary focus is removing data from the internet utilizing the operation privacy dashboard in conjunction with the strategy provided by the privacy manager. This role is primarily tactical in nature and requires the operator to follow the correct steps to ensure tasks are complete and documented correctly. 



Key Responsibilities

- Conducting Opt-outs on behalf of the client

- Setting up accounts on behalf of the client

- Ingesting disinformation to obfuscate client PII

- Creating all necessary baseline infrastructure accounts as directed by Privacy Manager (VPN, Password Manager, Secure
, secure file share)

- Ensuring each clients Operation Privacy dashboard stays current

- Communicating relevant information to the Privacy Manager

- Conducting OSINT on Client to identify exposure

- Conduct SEO tasks to promote Clients reputation online



Required Qualifications

- Education: Completion of all Six prerequisite courses. Certifications or degree in security, cybersecurity, technical surveillance, information technology or investigations

- Experience: at least 1 years of OSINT investigations, security operations and/or ethical hacking

- Technical Skills:

 - OSINT Investigations

 - Computer and communication technology

 - Video conferencing platforms

 - Surveillance/counter-surveillance

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Ability to work independently and manage priorities effectively

- Excellent time management skills

- Able to dedicate appropriate time required to deliver result



Preferred Qualifications

- Advanced education or certifications in Privacy, OSINT, Cybersecurity

- Familiarity with signal, proton suite of products, apple, android, bitwarden, macOS, linux, windows, data brokers

- Demonstrated leadership or project ownership experience

- Experience in managing multiple clients



Core Competencies

Define the behavioral and professional traits expected for success.

- Professional judgment and discretion

- Attention to detail

- Analytical and problem-solving ability

- Time management and reliability

- Adaptability in dynamic environments

- Superb interpersonal communication skills



Work Environment & Physical Requirements

- Work is primarily performed remote

- May require travel and extended screen time

- Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform essential functions



Confidentiality & Compliance

This position involves access to sensitive or confidential information. The manager is expected to maintain strict confidentiality and adhere to all applicable company policies, ethical standards, and legal requirements.

title: Senior Paid Media Manager (Google Ads & Meta)
description:
We are marketing agency seeking an experienced Senior PPC Manager to lead and optimize paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta, with a strong focus on lead quality, conversion performance, and measurable business impact.



This role is ideal for someone who understands that low-cost clicks and high lead volume are meaningless unless they translate into qualified prospects and real customers.



You take ownership of performance, think beyond surface-level metrics, and continuously test, refine, and optimize campaigns with clear intent. You are comfortable working in performance-driven environments where results matter, and you know how to identify opportunities, troubleshoot underperformance, and drive consistent improvements in conversion rates.



REQUIREMENTS

5+ years of hands-on PPC experience

Strong expertise in Google Ads (especially Search campaigns)

Solid understanding of conversion tracking, attribution, and performance measurement

Proven ability to improve lead quality—not just reduce CPC

Comfortable owning performance and being accountable for results

Clear and professional written English communication



RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage, optimize, and scale Google Ads and Meta campaigns

Drive improvements in lead quality, cost per lead (CPL), and conversion rates

Plan and execute structured testing across keywords, audiences, creatives, and landing pages

Monitor campaign performance and implement proactive, data-driven optimizations

Analyze results and provide clear, actionable insights and recommendations



WHAT WE CARE ABOUT

Generating qualified leads, not just volume

Understanding user intent and filtering out low-quality traffic

Making data-driven decisions and communicating the “why” behind them



NICE TO HAVE

Experience working with service-based businesses

Landing page optimization and/or CRO experience



TO APPLY

Please answer the following:

1.) Campaign Experience

Briefly describe one lead generation campaign you managed (industry, monthly budget, CPL, and results).

2.) Lead Quality Optimization

How do you diagnose and improve poor lead quality in PPC campaigns?

3.) Account Management

How many accounts do you currently manage (or have recently managed), and how do you allocate your time across them?

4.) Technical & Budget Experience

-What is the largest monthly ad budget you have personally managed (in USD)?

-How do you manage negative keywords at scale?

5.) Tools & Process

Do you use Google Ads Editor? If yes, how and how often?



Please include your resume and desired pay (Please ensure your resume link is publicly accessible and does not require permission to view)



Please begin your application with the phrase “I have read and understood the job requirements.” Applications that do not follow this instruction may not be reviewed.



This role will begin with a paid trial period, with the opportunity to transition into a long-term position based on performance.

title: Bid Solicitor
description:
Responsibilities



Market & bench building

*Build and continuously expand TriArc’s qualified trade partner database by trade, geography, capacity, and performance.

*Run ongoing prequalification (financials, safety, workload, bonding) in coordination with Accounting.



Bid strategy & scheduling

*Publish the rolling Bid Calendar; align milestones with Estimators/PMs and owners/architects.

*Break down drawings/specs into clear trade packages; assign scope sheets and alternates.



ITB execution

*Prepare Invitation to Bid packages (drawings, specs, addenda, bid forms, alternates, due dates, delivery method).

*Post to BuildingConnected; segment targeted lists; personalize top-tier outreach.



Relentless follow-up

*3-touch cadence (Day 1
 + Day 3 call/text + Day 5 confirmation) and pre-deadline “nudge” to secure commitments.

*Track interest/no-bid reasons; backfill gaps early; escalate risk areas to Estimating.



Bid intake & leveling

*Receive bids, confirm inclusions/exclusions, and level against scope sheets; flag outliers and VE options.

*Package a clean Bid Leveling Matrix for Estimators/PMs with award recommendation.



Data & feedback loops

*Score and rate trade partner performance post-award (price accuracy, quality, safety, schedule).

*Run post-bid debriefs; capture lessons learned to refine future ITBs.



Brand & relationship

*Be TriArc’s front door for subs: fast answers, fair process, respectful communication, and values-based partnership.





Required Traits & Skills

*Excellent Communication Skills

*Hunter mentality: proactive, persistent, upbeat on the phone; comfortable making 30–50 quality contacts/day in peak cycles.

*Construction fluency: understands typical scopes (CSI divisions), alternates, addenda, and gaps that derail bids.

*Process discipline: lives in checklists, documents everything.

*Communication: crisp writing, professional phone presence, tact with hard-bid deadlines.

*Values fit: Do what you say • Do the right thing • Gumption • Stick-to-itiveness • Passion/Enthusiasm.



Nice-to-Have

*Customer Service / Appointment Setting experience

*GC pre-con/bid desk experience or supplier/manufacturer rep background.

*Existing DFW sub network across interiors, ground-up flex/industrial, retail shells.



Key KPIs & Scorecard (reported weekly)

*% trade packages with 3+ bids (primary KPI)

*Avg. bids per trade

*% bids on time

*coverage gaps prevented (and when caught)

*Prequal completion rate / expirations cured

*Diversity/bench depth by top 15 trades

*ITB Bid cycle time

*Trade partner satisfaction pulse



Sample Weekly Cadence

*Mon: Publish bid calendar; align with Estimators; identify coverage risks.

*Tue–Thu: ITB sends, follow-ups, phone blocks, addendum broadcasts, pre-deadline confirmations.

*Fri: Deliver leveled bid matrices; update KPIs; partner thank-you touchpoints.



Technical Requirements:

*Computer: Intel i5 processor or equivalent with at least 8GB RAM

*Internet: Minimum 50 MBPS download speed

*Dual Monitor is required

*Noise cancellation headset

*HD Cam (Clutter Free, Ideally Plain Well-lit background)



Job Details:

*Job Type: Full-time (40 hours per week)

*Schedule: Monday to Friday 8:30 AM – 4:30 PM CDT - Monday to Friday 9:30 PM - 5:30 AM PHT

*Salary Range: PHP 40,000 – 65,000 monthly, depending on experience.



Application Instruction:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagO7KL90nGSfhiE9/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

Job Details:

title: Advanced Video Editor
description:
Video Editor (Advanced)



We're looking for a talented and detail-obsessed video editor to join our team. This is not a basic cutting-and-splicing role — we need someone who can create cinematic, high-energy content that stops people mid-scroll.



What You'll Be Editing

Content for coaching, personal brand, and online courses — including YouTube videos, short-form reels/TikToks, and promotional content.



The Standard We're Looking For

We love the editing style of creator Chloe Shih — if you've watched her videos, you'll know what we mean: clean motion graphics, snappy pacing, intentional color grading, smooth text animations, and a polished, premium feel throughout. You should be able to watch her content, understand the aesthetic, and replicate that level of quality.



You Must Be Able To:



Edit long-form YouTube videos (talking head + B-roll) with dynamic pacing

Create smooth text animations and lower thirds

Apply professional color grading to match a consistent brand aesthetic

Add motion graphics and visual effects (no basic jump cuts — we want elevated editing)

Edit short-form vertical content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) with trending caption styles

Sync music to cuts and transitions naturally

Work independently and hit deadlines without hand-holding



Software Requirements



Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or Final Cut Pro

Familiar with Adobe After Effects (for motion graphics)

Bonus: CapCut for short-form content



To Apply, Please:



Share your portfolio or YouTube channel featuring examples of your work

Share a specific video where you believe your editing is most similar to Chloe Shih's style

Tell us your rate and availability



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Service VA Manager - SHOPIFY EXPERIENCE REQUIRED
description:
Online-based, US-based jewelry brand



This is a high-paced and sometimes high-stress role, especially during busy periods like viral posts, product launches, or shipping delays. You should be comfortable learning new tools quickly, adapting to changing priorities, and solving problems independently.



If you have prior Shopify experience (checking orders, editing orders, creating discount codes, etc.), I expect you to be able to fully onboard within approximately 4 hours and begin assisting with tasks the same day.



Our company is growing rapidly, this VA position will evolve into managing and training additional VAs who support customer service and operations starting in a few months.



SHOPIFY EXPERIENCE IS REQUIRED. You must already know Shopify. 



Job Scope:

Respond to customer
s and DMs in a timely, thoughtful manner:

Handle exchanges, sizing questions, and return requests

Troubleshoot shipping issues and lost packages

Address reviews with care and professionalism

Document recurring issues and suggest improvements

Manage other VA's



You will be the first hire in our Customer Service Department. You must be a self-starter, and thrive working independently.

title: Accounts Assistant (Xero) – Ongoing Role – Australian Business (Remote)
description:
About us

We are a fast-growing fitness franchise business based in Australia, operating multiple locations. We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Accounts Assistant to support our finance operations across multiple entities.



This is a long-term role with consistent weekly work.



About the role

You will be responsible for keeping our accounts up to date, organised, and under control. This is not a strategy role — it is a hands-on execution role with clear weekly tasks.



You will be working in Xero across multiple companies.



Key responsibilities



Daily / Ongoing:



Reconcile bank transactions in Xero (all entities)

Code and categorise transactions accurately

Maintain clean and up-to-date accounts (no backlog)



Accounts Payable:



Enter supplier bills into Xero

Maintain a clear list of upcoming and overdue payments

Prepare weekly payment summaries for approval



Accounts Receivable (light):



Track outstanding invoices (if applicable)

Assist with basic follow-ups



Weekly:



Ensure all accounts are fully reconciled to current date

Prepare a weekly payment report (who needs to be paid, when, and priority)

Flag any overdue or urgent items early



After payroll:



Process and reconcile payroll entries in Xero (payroll will be run by us)



What we’re looking for



Required:



Strong experience with Xero

Experience with:

Bank reconciliations

Accounts payable (bills and payments)

High attention to detail

Strong written English

Ability to follow structured processes and meet weekly deadlines



Preferred:



Experience supporting Australian businesses

Understanding of basic finance workflows (AP/AR)



What success looks like



All bank accounts reconciled daily or near real-time

No backlog of transactions

Clear visibility of what needs to be paid each week

No missed supplier payments



Hours & setup



Part-time to start (approx. 20 hours/week)

Potential to increase

Long-term ongoing role



To apply (important)



Please include:



A short summary of your Xero experience

A brief description of your experience with bank reconciliations and accounts payable

Your availability (hours per week)

The word “BALANCED” at the top of your application (this helps us filter attention to detail)

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Contract) – Legal Tech Platform
description:
Senior Full-Stack Developer (Contract) – Legal Tech Platform

Remote – Contract (3–6 months, potential long-term role)



About Summerall Law

Summerall Law is a technology-forward estate planning firm building a new platform called Essential Estates.

Essential Estates aims to automate and simplify estate planning and trust administration while reducing legal complexity and cost for families. 

The platform will eventually power estate planning services for multiple law firms.



The Role

We are seeking a senior full-stack developer to work on a key platform initiative.

The first major project will be replacing the firm's current Formstack-based document generation system with an internal platform that supports automated document generation and editing.

This is a contract role initially focused on delivering a high-impact system that will become a core part of the Essential Estates platform.



Primary Responsibilities

Design and implement a document automation system that:

• Generates legal documents from structured data

• Supports merge fields and template rendering

• Allows attorneys to edit language without breaking document regeneration

• Integrates with the Essential Estate platform backend

• Replaces the current Formstack Documents workflow

You will collaborate with:

• existing engineering team

• product leadership

• designers

• attorneys who use the system daily



Technology Stack

Frontend

React

TypeScript

Backend

NestJS (Node)

Database

PostgreSQL

Infrastructure

AWS



Requirements

• 5+ years experience building production web applications

• strong experience with React and Node-based backend frameworks

• experience designing backend APIs and data models

• ability to work independently in a small team environment

• strong English communication skills

• proficiency in leveraging AI and AI agents to prototype and ship code

Candidates must overlap with US Pacific afternoon working hours (at least noon-6pm Pacific).



Nice to Have

Experience with:

• document generation systems

• templating engines

• workflow automation systems

• legal technology platforms



Contract Details

Initial contract: 3–6 months

Possible extension or long-term role depending on project needs.

We are open to candidates located in:

• Eastern Europe

• Philippines

• Latin America



How to Apply

Please include:

• GitHub or portfolio

• example of a system you built end-to-end

• short description of why this project interests you

Compensation

This is a contract role with a budget of $20 per hour

title: Business Development Representitive
description:
Business Development Representative (SDR) - Remote | Attain Technology



We are a growing IT Managed Services Provider based in Rhode Island, and we are looking for a sharp, driven Business Development Representative to join our team. If you are a natural communicator who loves the hunt, knows how to open doors, and takes pride in your craft -- this role is for you.



What You Will Be Doing



Prospecting and qualifying new business opportunities via outbound outreach (calls,
, LinkedIn)

Setting appointments and building pipeline for our sales team

Representing Attain Technology with professionalism and confidence in every interaction

Tracking activity and managing your pipeline in our CRM

Meeting and exceeding monthly outreach and appointment-setting targets



What We Are Looking For



Minimum 5 years of experience as a Sales Development Representative or in a similar outbound sales role

Flawless spoken and written English -- this is non-negotiable

Highly self-motivated with a hunter mentality and a strong sense of ownership

Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Familiarity with CRM tools and outbound sales workflows

Experience in technology, IT services, or B2B sales is a strong plus



Compensation



Base Pay: $5.00 to $10.00 per hour USD, depending on experience



Bonus: You also earn a per-appointment bonus for every qualified meeting you book that shows up. This is not a token gesture -- it is a real opportunity to meaningfully increase your earnings based on your output. The more you produce, the more you make.



This is a performance-driven role. If you are the kind of person who wants a ceiling on what you can earn, this is not the right fit. If you want to be rewarded for results, keep reading.



How to Apply -- Important



To be considered for this role, your FIRST step is to send us a short video introduction (2 to 3 minutes). In your video, tell us:



Who you are and where you are based

Your SDR experience and what types of companies you have sold to

Why you are the right fit for this role

One outbound tactic or approach that has worked well for you



Applications submitted without a video introduction will not be reviewed. This is your first chance to show us what you can do -- make it count.



We look forward to meeting you.

title: Sports Film Editing
description: Using a provided Adobe Premiere project file as a template, cut, edit, and export 16 volleyball matches. Cut dead time at the start and end of the match, as well as remove timeouts. title: Video Editor — Need Editor To Edit Facebook & Instagram Ad Creatives
description:
About Us:

Kingdom Ecom is a fast growing ecommerce company. We run a high volume low ticket funnel and we need a creative video editor to help us scale our ad output consistently every week.



The Role:

We need a video editor who can take existing raw footage and turn it into multiple high converting
 and Instagram ad creatives. Think of it like making sandwiches. We provide the hooks, the bodies, and the CTAs. Your job is to assemble them in different combinations to create multiple ad variations from the same footage. The goal is to test as many angles as possible every week.

This is not a role where we tell you exactly what to do every step of the way. We need someone creative, proactive, and obsessed with what makes ads stop the scroll and convert.



What You Will Be Doing:

Taking existing video content and editing it into multiple short form ad creatives for
 and Instagram. Mixing different hooks, bodies, and CTAs to create multiple variations from one video. Adding captions, b roll, text overlays, and transitions to make ads more engaging. Studying what is working in our current ads and creating new variations based on winning elements. Delivering 15 or more ad variations per week consistently.



What We Are Looking For:

Proven experience editing
 or Instagram ad creatives. Strong understanding of direct response video ads and what makes people stop scrolling. Ability to work independently and bring creative ideas without needing constant direction. Fast turnaround time. Experience with ecommerce or info product ads is a big plus. Proficiency in Capcut, Adobe Premiere, or similar editing software.



What We Offer:

$500 per month starting salary with a performance increase after 30 days based on output and quality. This is a full time remote position with long term growth opportunity for the right person.



To Apply:

Send us the following or your application will not be considered:



Your portfolio or examples of
 and Instagram ad creatives you have edited

Your experience with ecommerce or direct response video ads

Answer this question in your application: What is the most important element of a winning
 ad and why?

title: USA EST SALES BOOKING AGENT 3/30/26
description:
USD  $500 starting salary per month plus commission of 1% of the the complete closing of the sale (average sale is $2000), paid on the 1st and 15th of every month(PST). We book an average of 10-20 shows per month.

If I need to close the sale completely, then you will get .5% commission for that lead. Commisions will be paid after the event takes place during that scheduled pay period.



PLEASE REVIEW MY MALE DANCE TOURING BUSINESS, 
 and if this is of interest PLEASE ANSWER MY 4 QUESTIONS below.



You MUST ANSWER the 4 questions in order to be considered.



QUESTION 1: WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?

We are looking for people that have an english speaking capability on a scale of 1-10.

YOU MUST BE BETWEEN 9-10.

AGAIN, WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?



QUESTION 2: DID YOU REVIEW THE WEBSITE ABOVE? You will be asked questions about our business.



Initial training/onboarding period (first 2 weeks):

To help you ease into the role and allow us to assess how we work together, we’ll start you at half the regular hours as follows:



Tuesday to Saturday: 3:00 AM – 7:00 AM PHT

Corresponding to 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM EST (Mon–Fri)

Sunday: 6:00 AM – 9:00 AM PHT

Corresponding to 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST (Sat)



After the 2-week period, assuming everything goes well, you’ll transition to the full-time schedule outlined below.



Full-time schedule (after the initial period):

Tuesday to Saturday: 11:00 PM – 7:00 AM PHT

Sunday: 3:00 AM – 9:00 AM PHT



This corresponds to the following times in US Eastern Standard Time (EST):

Monday to Friday: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST

Saturday: 3:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST



QUESTION 3: Are you good with these hours?



I am looking for a long term, full time booking agent that will book our shows at bars, nightclubs and casinos in different states. You will gather leads by google searching for bars and nightclubs



Our workflow relies heavily on Google Workspace tools:

Google Sheets is used daily as a shared tracker for gathering and managing leads (bars/nightclubs we’re researching/touring), including columns for names, addresses, contacts, notes, status, etc.

We also use Google Docs for contracts, Google Drive for organizing and searching files, and Google Calendar for scheduling.

No advanced expertise is required—just solid familiarity so you can jump in quickly and keep things organized.



QUESTION 4: Do you have solid familiarity with Google Workspace tools?



We will train you with our sales script.

Must have a laptop or desktop AND preferably an IPHONE with Icloud calendar. BUT an android will do. Also MUST have a headset WITH NOISE CANCELLATION.



GOOD LUCK!

title: AI Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
Role Summary

We are seeking an AI Implementation Specialist to help drive our internal APEX initiative, focused on bringing practical AI into the business to improve speed, accuracy, reporting, process consistency, and operational execution.

This is a full-time role for someone who is highly organized, resourceful, detail-oriented, and excited about using AI tools to solve real business problems. This person does not need to be a traditional software engineer, but they do need to be highly capable with modern AI tools and able to use them to build workflows, improve processes, create useful outputs, and move projects forward quickly.

You will start by supporting quality control and execution inside our APEX roadmap, helping validate outputs, improve workflows, organize information, and assist in implementation. Over time, this role will expand into building and improving AI-enabled systems across multiple departments.

This is a role for a builder. We are not looking for someone who only talks about AI. We are looking for someone who can use it to produce real results inside a real business.

What You Will Be Working On

Examples of projects in this role may include:

• AI-assisted SOP creation, refinement, and maintenance

• KPI dashboards, scorecards, and reporting support

• Workflow automations

• Process mapping and documentation

• Data cleanup and structuring for AI use

• Internal knowledge organization

• Quality control of AI-generated outputs

• Building practical tools and workflows that improve team performance

• Supporting implementation of our APEX roadmap across departments

Primary Duties

• Help execute and support our internal APEX initiative for AI adoption and business improvement

• Review, validate, and improve AI-generated work for accuracy, usefulness, and consistency

• Build and refine workflows using AI tools to improve business processes

• Assist in documenting SOPs, workflows, standards, and process maps

• Help create reporting tools, metrics tracking systems, and operational scorecards

• Organize business information so it can be used more effectively by AI systems

• Collaborate with leadership and internal tea
mbers to identify high-value opportunities for AI implementation

• Test ideas quickly, improve them, and turn them into repeatable systems

• Use good judgment to distinguish between useful output and low-quality AI-generated noise

• Support implementation projects across operations, admin, finance, customer service, and other business functions

• Maintain clear documentation of what is being built, why it matters, and how it should be used

• Continuously look for ways to improve efficiency, leverage, and execution

Tools and Systems You May Work With

Experience with all of these is not required, but comfort learning and working with tools like these is important:

• Claude Code

• Google Sheets / Excel

• ClickUp

• n8n

• Metabase

• SQL / Postgres / Supabase

• QuickBooks

• Other internal systems and operational tools

We will provide access to Claude Code for the person hired for this role.

Ideal Candidate Profile

We are looking for someone who is:

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Strong in written English

• Naturally proactive and resourceful

• Fast at learning new tools and systems

• Good at following structure while still thinking independently

• Comfortable working with ambiguity and figuring things out

• Process-minded and improvement-oriented

• Able to turn messy ideas into clean outputs

• Interested in business operations, not just technology

• Focused on usefulness, execution, and real-world results

• Curious, persistent, and capable of self-management

Essential Qualifications and Competencies

• Experience using AI tools in a practical business setting

• Ability to use AI to help create workflows, documentation, reports, or automations

• Strong written communication skills in English

• High attention to detail and strong quality-control instincts

• Ability to learn systems quickly and work across different business functions

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple tasks

• Good judgment and problem-solving ability

• Reliable follow-through and professional work habits

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with workflow automation tools such as n8n 

• Experience with spreadsheets, reporting, and KPI tracking

• Experience supporting SOPs, QA, process improvement, or operations

• Basic familiarity with APIs, SQL, databases, or structured business data (nice to have)

• Experience using AI to support implementation rather than just content generation

• Experience working with U.S.-based companies or remote teams (nice to have)

This Role Is Not For You If

• You only have theoretical interest in AI and no real examples of using it to improve work

• You rely on AI outputs without checking them for quality or accuracy

• Your written English is weak

• You struggle to follow structure, naming conventions, or process discipline

• You are not comfortable learning new software and systems quickly

• You need constant direction for every task

• You cannot work the required schedule consistently

• You are looking for a side job rather than a serious full-time role

Employment Details

Position Type: Full-time

This role requires full availability during assigned hours and cannot be combined with other employment.

Schedule: Monday through Friday, U.S. Central Time, 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM with a 1-hour break

Philippines equivalent timing will vary seasonally.

Compensation: PHP 45,000 - 75,000 monthly, paid weekly

Paid leave provided for recognized U.S. holidays when operations are suspended.

About Our Organization

Join Tri-State Tree Service, an industry leader with three decades of exceptional service throughout Pensacola, Florida and surrounding areas. Our TCIA accreditation places us among an exclusive group, with fewer than 1% of tree care companies achieving this distinction.

We believe in operational excellence, continuous improvement, and using technology to create real competitive advantage. We invest heavily in systems, equipment, process improvement, and innovation. This role is part of a larger initiative to build practical AI into the business in a way that creates real leverage and long-term value.

If you want to help build something meaningful, improve the way a real business operates, and grow with a company that is serious about execution, this is an excellent opportunity.

Application Requirements

To be considered, please complete all of the following:

1. Use AI Implementer as the subject line of your application

2. Submit your current resume

3. Provide a link to a video introduction of no more than 3 minutes explaining:

o your experience using AI tools in real work

o the most useful thing you have built or improved using AI

o why you are a strong fit for this position

4. Complete the short screening task below

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

Candidates must have a reliable computer, stable internet connectivity.

Screening Task

Please complete the following short task as part of your application:

Choose one business process that could be improved using AI. Examples:

• SOP creation or maintenance

• Quality control of team outputs

• KPI reporting

• Workflow documentation

• Customer service responses

• Task follow-up or internal accountability

Submit a short response that includes:

1. A brief description of the business problem

2. How you would use AI to improve it

3. What tools you would use

4. A simple example of the workflow

5. One risk or limitation of your approach and how you would handle it

Keep your answer practical and concise. We are not looking for the most technical answer. We are looking for clear thinking, good judgment, and real business usefulness.

title: Senior Virtual Assistant + Creative & Operations
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled, proactive Virtual Assistant / Creative & Operations Specialist to support a fast-growing beauty business expanding into online education.



This role is ideal for someone who loves beauty, social media, and content creation, but also understands how their work contributes to leads, sales, and revenue growth. You’ll work closely with the business owner to execute high-quality Instagram and website content, manage key systems, support course launches, and keep everything running smoothly 

helping the business scale efficiently.



What You’ll Do:

Transform strategy and ideas into carousels, graphics, templates, posts, stories, and Reels

Edit professional short-form videos with captions, cuts, and effects

Ensure brand consistency and aesthetic across all social media

Schedule content from Google Drive or provided assets

Suggest creative improvements to posts, layouts, and engagement to drive leads and enrollments

Creative & Operational Support

Send student welcome
s and onboarding packs

Manage bookings and
 enquiries 

Track leads, manage the waitlist, and support sales funnels

Assist with Shopify updates (products, pages, course content, and funnels)

Maintain systems and workflows to keep operations efficient

 marketing and creating campaigns from founders strategy

Help prepare course content and materials for launch

Manage project follow-through to ensure timelines are met

Support any creative, operational, or admin projects as needed

Suggest process improvements to streamline workflow and increase revenue



Who This Role Is For:

Someone passionate about beauty and creating high-quality, conversion-focused content

Highly organised, proactive, and detail-oriented

Experienced in Instagram content creation, including Reels, carousels, and community management

Confident in Canva or Adobe and editing professional videos

Experienced with Shopify and content management systems

Comfortable supporting
 systems (Klaviyo, Claude, or similar) for welcome sequences, lead nurturing, and launches

Takes initiative, suggests improvements, and follows through without needing constant direction

Understands that content, systems, and launches directly impact revenue and growth



Key Requirements:

Strong written English

Reliable internet and consistent availability

Experience with beauty or lifestyle brands preferred

Excellent attention to detail and follow-through

Proven ability to create content that drives engagement and sales



To Apply:

Please
 your application with the subject line:

FACEOFBROWS VA



Include:

A short introduction about you

Examples of Instagram content you’ve created (posts, carousels, or Reels)



Applications without “FACEOFBROWS VA” in the subject line will not be considered.



Why This Role Matters:

You’ll create high-quality content, support launches, manage key systems, and handle admin 

giving the business owner more time to focus on strategy, growth, and revenue. Your work will directly impact lead generation, course enrollments, and business growth, helping the brand scale

title: Part-Time Virtual Assistant — Graphic Design / Email / Social Media (Ecommerce)
description:
About Foretra

Foretra is a small, family-owned Canadian golf brand founded in 2016. We design premium golf headcovers and accessories for golfers who want their gear to actually say something about who they are.



We’re not a mass-market brand. We focus on identity, quality, and standing out.



We’re growing fast and looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help us scale without losing what makes the brand special.

What You’ll Be Doing



Core Responsibilities (Daily / Weekly)

• Research and create high-performing hooks and captions for Instagram posts and ads

• Create and publish Instagram content using provided frameworks and brand guidelines

• Source, organize, and repurpose UGC and ambassador content for ads and social

• Build and schedule Klaviyo
 campaigns using templates and provided copy

• Design and resize ad creatives and social assets in Canva

• Update Shopify (product pages, images, collections, discounts)

• Organize Meta ad creatives inside Ads Manager (naming, labeling, structure)

• Pull weekly performance data (Shopify, Meta, Klaviyo) into a shared report

• Edit and enhance product images using AI tools (Photoshop, Firefly, or similar)

Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

• Interest in golf, sports, or lifestyle brands

• Experience supporting Amazon listings (images, bullet points, keywords, A+ Content)



Required Skills & Experience

• Proficient with Shopify

• Proficient with Klaviyo

• Proficient with Canva

• Strong understanding of social media marketing

• Basic knowledge of
 marketing strategy and automation

• Experience with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Nano Banana)

• Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• Able to work independently and meet deadlines



What Success Looks Like (Important)

• Content is posted consistently and on time

• Content drives engagement and follower growth, not just output

• Hooks and captions improve performance across posts and ads

• Assets are clean, organized, and easy to find

•
s go out without errors

• Product pages stay updated and optimized

• You proactively spot issues and fix them before being asked



Who You Are

• Extremely detail-oriented, you catch what others miss

• Reliable and accountable, if you say it’s done, it’s done

• Comfortable following brand guidelines and creative direction

• Organized and able to manage multiple tasks without dropping the ball

• Curious and quick to learn new tools

• Independent, but communicates clearly and consistently



Role Details

• Part-time: starting at 20 hours per week

• Trial period: up to 3 months

• Opportunity to grow into a full-time role for the right person

• Must be available for occasional calls during EST hours



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

To apply, please send:



1. Your resume

2. A portfolio or examples of your work (social posts,
s, graphics, etc.)

3. A short paragraph answering:

   “What makes a brand stand out on social media today?”

4. Write 3 hooks you would use to sell a golf headcover on Instagram



Important:

- Include the word “golf” in your subject line

- Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed



Final Note

We’re a small brand with a big personality.

If you take pride in your work, care about details, and want to be part of a growing ecommerce brand, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Community Manager (Sales-Focused, Campaign Role)
description:
ABOUT LUXNOMADS

LuxNomads is a premium relocation agency helping Americans leave the US and build their new life in Europe. With a 2M+ combined social following and 500+ clients relocated in our first year, we are one of the fastest growing relocation brands in the space.

 

ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for an experienced Community Manager to run the online community for an upcoming campaign expected to bring in 10,000+ participants. This is a contract role for the duration of the campaign.

 

You will be responsible for managing and engaging the community from day one — welcoming members, sparking conversations, answering questions, keeping the energy high, and ensuring participants stay engaged and moving through the experience.

 

A key part of this role is also sales-adjacent. After the campaign wraps, you will play an active role in making sure warm, engaged community members are booking calls with our sales team. You know how to guide people toward taking action without being pushy — and you understand that a thriving community is also a thriving pipeline.

 

RESPONSIBILITIES

— Welcome and engage every new community member personally

— Post daily engagement prompts and keep conversations active throughout the campaign

— Answer participant questions and escalate where needed

— Surface warm leads and buying signals to the sales team in real time

— Guide engaged members toward booking a call with the team after the campaign

— Manage the live event chat during the campaign's live session

— Post replays, links, and next steps immediately after the live event ends

— Report daily on community engagement and any notable activity

 

WHO YOU ARE

— You have experience managing large online communities (10,000+ members preferred)

— You have a sales or business development background — you understand conversion and know how to move people toward a decision

— You are warm, energetic, and know how to hold the energy of a large online room

— You are organised, fast, and never drop the ball during a live event

— You understand premium brands and can represent LuxNomads with the right tone

— Bonus: You have personal experience living or dreaming of relocating abroad

--- BIG Bonus if have experience with 
 Community Management

 

COMPENSATION

Flat campaign fee — discussed at interview based on experience. Strong performers will be considered for ongoing roles as LuxNomads continues to grow.

 

TO APPLY

Send your resume and a cover letter to 
 telling us about a community you've managed and your experience in sales or lead conversion.



IMPORTANT: DO NOT APPLY if you only have Virtual Assistant or basic moderation experience. This is a sales-adjacent role.

title: Product Research, SEO Listings and Customer Support on Vinted and Etsy ($200 per month)
description:

We are looking for a creative, resourceful, and curious person to help us find products and create perfect visuals for our Vinted store using AI.



Your (daily) missions:



Use Gemini AI to research trending fashion niches using our prompts.



Get inspired via Pinterest to understand the visual universe of these niches.



Find similar items on platforms like AliExpress, Temu, and Shein.



Generate realistic and stylish photos according to our methods (we will train you on this) using Gemini AI and ChatGPT.



What we expect from you:



To be autonomous and constantly improving.



To enjoy brainstorming, getting inspired, and immersing yourself in new niches to find the most suitable products.



To be meticulous regarding the quality of the generated photos.



No need to be a design expert: if you know how to use Gemini and have a fashion view on Shein, you already have a big advantage.



Compensation:



$200 per month (7 hours a day).



Paid time off.



Opportunities for growth and evolution.



Conditions:



100% Remote work.



Flexible working hours.



Complete training with ready-to-use processes upon your arrival.



How to apply:

Send a short message explaining:

(Send a cover letter through the platform)



Hello and welcome! My name is Kyoungbu Kang. This is my TikTok channel to understand what I do: 



To move forward, I'd like to invite you to a short test.



This task is designed to test your understanding, your ability to follow instructions, and how well you interpret style and detail — not just basic execution.



Here's the full step-by-step guide for the task (Google Doc):





Here's the video where I explain everything visually:





Important Notes:

– Don't worry if it's not perfect.

– What matters most is that you do your best, follow each step carefully, and show you understand what I'm really looking for.

– If you go a little further or improve a small part: that's a big plus



 About Gemini:

If you don't have Pro, try with the free version — it usually works, but with limitations.

Please let me know right away if you can't generate images, so I can find a solution.



Once you've completed the task, please send everything in one
 or message.



Send me your test by
 (you can use a Google Drive link) and also include your WhatsApp number.



Thanks again, and if your work is perfect for me, we will do a call together to explain what products I'm selling right now, and how to respond and list products on Vinted and Etsy.



There is also a possibility for evolution in salary to $300 per month for a job as a manager if you're good at your job.

title: Executive Assistant (EA) to the Company’s President
description:
*KINDLY READ THE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY BEFORE YOU APPLY. MAKE SURE YOU SEND THE COMPLETE REQUIREMENTS. CANDIDATES WHO WILL NOT FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS WILL BE AUTOMATICALLY REJECTED WITHOUT NOTICE. DO NOT APPLY IF YOU HAVE OTHER JOBS.*



The Nabo Group is looking for a responsible, dynamic, organized, detail oriented, and reliable Executive Assistant to work closely with the company's President.



The Executive Assistant to the President provides high-level administrative support to the President, ensuring efficient operation and communication within the executive office. This role involves managing calendar and other schedules, coordinating meetings, travel arrangements, handling correspondence, and performing a variety of tasks to facilitate the President's ability to lead the organization effectively. The Executive Assistant acts as a liaison between the President and internal/external stakeholders, maintaining confidentiality and professionalism at all times. This remote position requires exceptional organizational skills, proactive problem-solving abilities, to be available when needed and the capacity to work independently while maintaining a high level of accuracy and attention to detail.



Duties and responsibilities:

- Calendar Management: Coordinate and manage the President's schedule, including arranging meetings, appointments, and travel plans.

- Communication: Serve as the primary point of contact between the President and internal/external stakeholders, handling correspondence, phone calls, and
s.

- Meeting Coordination: Organize and prepare for meetings, including drafting agendas, taking minutes, and following up on action items.

- Document Management: Prepare, review, and manage documents, reports, and presentations for the President.

- Project Support: Assist with special projects, research, and data analysis as needed, ensuring timely completion and accuracy.

- Confidentiality: Maintain the highest level of confidentiality and discretion in handling sensitive information.

- Task Prioritization: Prioritize and manage multiple tasks and projects simultaneously, ensuring deadlines are met.

- Administrative Support: Provide general administrative support, including filing, expense reporting, and office supply management.

- Problem-Solving: Proactively identify and address issues that may impact the President's ability to lead effectively.

- Relationship Management: Build and maintain positive relationships with key stakeholders, both internally and externally.

- Travel Management: Arrange and coordinate travel itineraries, accommodations, and transportation for the President, ensuring all travel plans are efficient and cost-effective.

- Travel Management: Arrange and coordinate travel itineraries, accommodations, and transportation for the President, ensuring all travel plans are efficient and cost-effective.

- Compliance: Review contracts, agreements, and other legally-binding documents. Assist also with the Community Association Institute (CAI) tasks, which the President is an active board member.



Qualifications:

- 2-4 years of experience as a remote Executive Assistant, preferably from a US-based real-estate or property management firm

- Proficiency in using office software (MS Office Suite, Google Suite, etc.) and other project management tools.

- Ability to manage and organize
 correspondence efficiently.

- Ability to communicate effectively with internal and external clients in different levels, handle inquiries, and resolve issues.

- Experience in general admin tasks (preparing documents, handling expenses, maintaining records, travel management, etc.).

title: Advanced Short-Form Video Editor (Reels/TikTok) – Fast Turnaround, High Volume
description:
We are building a high-performance editing team focused on short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Highlights).



This is a production-driven role designed for editors who can move fast, think creatively, and consistently deliver high-quality work.



We are looking to work with the top 10–20% of editors — individuals who take pride in their craft, pay attention to detail, and care about the final product.





WHO WE ARE



We focus on transforming everyday 
nts into meaningful, high-quality highlight videos.



Our goal is simple:

help people relive and share their experiences through clean, intentional, and well-crafted edits.



We prioritize:

- human editing (not automated results)

- strong storytelling and pacing

- content that feels natural, emotional, and engaging



Every video represents a real 
nt. A memory, an experience, or a story that matters to someone.



We are building a team that takes pride in delivering work that people actually want to watch, keep, and share.





OUR CULTURE



We operate in a performance-driven environment where:

- quality matters

- speed matters

- consistency matters



We value:

- attention to detail

- ownership of your work

- continuous improvement



This is a “learn more, earn more” system.



Editors who improve their speed, quality, and reliability gain access to:

- higher earnings

- more volume and priority work

- long-term growth opportunities





ROLE DETAILS



You will be editing:



- short-form highlight videos (Reels / TikTok)

- lifestyle and experience-based content

- content for creators, brands, and businesses



Projects may include:

- personal highlights (events, travel, lifestyle)

- creator content (social media storytelling, engagement content)

- business content (marketing, promotions, brand storytelling)



Editors must be able to adapt style, pacing, and tone depending on the type of content.





SCHEDULE



- Philippines Time: 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM

- 6 days per week (approx. 30–36 hours/week)

- You must be available and focused during your scheduled shift





COMPENSATION



This is a performance-based role (paid per highlight).



Your earnings are based on:

- speed

- quality

- consistency



Typical earnings range from $600 to $1,800+ per month, with the ability to increase over time.



We use a structured progression system where editors advance based on performance.



As you improve, you gain:

- higher pay per highlight

- access to more work and priority assignments

- performance-based bonuses



Higher-level editors may gain access to more advanced projects, including creator and business content, based on performance and consistency.



This role is designed for editors who want to grow and earn more over time.





REQUIREMENTS



Editing Skills:

- Strong experience editing short-form content (Reels/TikTok)

- Clean cuts, transitions, pacing, and music sync

- Ability to execute quickly with minimal direction



Equipment & Internet:

- Computer capable of smooth video editing

- Stable internet (50 Mbps+ recommended)

- Backup internet required



Work Environment (CRITICAL):

You must have access to a stable and reliable work environment.



This includes:

- coworking space

- office environment

- OR home setup with backup power and backup internet



Applicants without a reliable setup will not be considered.



Location:

- Must be located in or near a major city or have access to reliable infrastructure





SELECTION PROCESS



This is a selective, performance-based opportunity.



Applications, portfolio quality, and live editing evaluation determine your starting level and access to work.



We are looking for the top 10–20% of applicants.



Only top candidates will be contacted.





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)



To apply, you must complete the application form provided in this job post.





Follow all instructions carefully.



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Marketing Director / Project Manager (Remote)
description:
Marketing Director / Project Manager (Remote)

Full-Time | Competitive Salary

About Us

We're a fast-growing personal injury law firm based in Houston, Texas with cases across Texas and California. We invest heavily in marketing and we need someone to run it, not just oversee it.

The Role

This is part project manager, part creative director, and a lot of vendor wrangling. You'll be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks across five or six active marketing workstreams at once. You report directly to the firm owner, and you'll need to be comfortable pushing back on deadlines, flagging problems early, and managing up when you need approvals or content from a busy trial lawyer.

This is not a "set the strategy and delegate" role. You will be in the weeds.

What You'll Actually Be Doing

Managing our SEO vendor: making sure they have the content they need, holding them to contract deliverables, reviewing what they're doing to the website, and making creative suggestions when their output is stale.

Managing our PPC vendor: tracking spend vs. signed cases, understanding the numbers, and knowing when to push for better performance.

Running our MMA sponsorship: we're the title sponsor of a local MMA promotion with bimonthly events. You'll coordinate event graphics, produce and edit video content for their broadcasts and Instagram, and keep that relationship running smoothly.

Producing client testimonial videos: scheduling shoots with real clients, recording the interviews, and editing them into polished videos for the website and social media.

Managing our YouTube vendor: we shoot raw content and send it to an editing team. You'll manage the script pipeline, make sure the owner reviews and approves scripts on time, and keep production moving.

Running social media: consistent posting across all platforms, maintaining brand voice, and keeping a real content calendar (not just posting when you remember).

Weekly rhythm: You'll check in with the owner once a week. Come prepared with what you accomplished, what's stuck, and what's next. Stay organized enough that you can speak to quarterly campaign goals, weekly social output, and bimonthly event deadlines without scrambling.

Who We're Looking For

Someone who thrives on keeping multiple projects moving and doesn't need to be told what to do next. You're organized enough to manage five vendors and assertive enough to hold them (and the owner) accountable.

Specifically:

3+ years in marketing with real experience managing external vendors and creative projects. Experience with video editing and content creation (Canva, CapCut, or similar tools). Comfortable with social media management across multiple platforms. Strong enough communicator to manage up to a CEO who's juggling a caseload. Genuinely excited about AI tools for marketing, whether that's video editing, SEO, content creation, or workflow automation. We're actively looking to incorporate new tools and want someone who brings ideas, not someone who needs to be convinced.

Experience in legal marketing is a plus but not required. What matters more is that you can manage chaos, produce quality work, and keep everything on schedule.

To Apply

Send your resume and a brief note on how you've managed multiple vendor relationships or marketing workstreams simultaneously. Bonus points if you can point to video content you've produced or edited.
