title: STAFF ACCOUNTANT with Streamline Portal Expertise
description:
Job Title: Staff Accountant with Streamline Portal Expertise

 Company: Blacksand Property Management

 Location: Remote

 Employment Type: Full-Time

 Reports To: COO / Financial Controller / Lead Finance





We Need: Hands-On Staff Accountant with Streamline Portal Expertise, Accounting Discipline, and Business Insight.



Blacksand Property Management is seeking a hands-on Staff Accountant responsible for executing all day-to-day accounting activities across multiple entities within our multi-family real estate portfolio. This role is designed for a detail-oriented accounting professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, can independently handle transactional workflows, and knows when to escalate questions or seek guidance.

You will be responsible for accounts payable, bank reconciliations, monthly close tasks, property-level accounting, and AppFolio-driven workflows. Expertise in the Streamline Portal, particularly in processing owner payouts, is essential. This position supports the Financial Controller, Finance Lead and COO by producing accurate financial data.





Accounting & Daily Operations



- Execute core accounting tasks including general ledger entries, A/P, A/R, bank feeds, and bank reconciliations

- Process all accounts payable: update AP inbox, enter invoices, assign GL codes, match supporting documents, obtain approvals, and prepare weekly check runs

- Maintain accurate vendor files, W-9s, and support year-end 1099 preparation

- Record tenant receipts, deposits, refunds, and daily cash activity in AppFolio

- Perform daily and weekly cash reviews and notify Controller of cash issues or variances

- Maintain orderly financial documentation and ensure accuracy across all entities

- Manage multi-family real estate financial workflows, including rent rolls, property-level ledgers, owner statements, and capital expenditure tracking

- Utilize AppFolio for property accounting, reporting, owner distributions, and financial review across multi-family assets

Streamline Portal for owner payout processing, ensuring accuracy and timely disbursement of funds

- Ensure that you have Streamline Portal experience. Here is the link to check on the portal:





Month-End Close



Complete accounting close activities such as:

Posting journal entries

Prepaid and accrual adjustments

Mortgage, escrow, and loan activity posting

Reconciliation of balance sheet accounts

Review of income and expense accounts for accuracy

Prepare property-level workpapers for Controller/CFO review

Ensure all property ledgers agree to supporting statements (bank, mortgage, security deposits, etc.)



Property-Level & Multi-Entity Accounting



Manage AppFolio property accounting including:

Rent rolls

Tenant ledgers

Property GL

Security deposits

Owner statements

Capital expenditure tracking

Ensure accurate entity-to-property mapping in AppFolio and QBO

Maintain intercompany transactions following established workflows

Support owner distributions by preparing accurate cash position schedules



Financial Reporting Support



Prepare draft financial statements for review

Generate AppFolio financial and operational reports as requested

Provide variance notes or coding corrections before Controller review

Maintain audit-ready documentation for all reconciliations and entries



Internal Controls & Compliance



Follow established accounting SOPs and internal controls

Maintain orderly documentation for bank reconciliations, AP invoices, and property workflows

Support year-end tax preparation by gathering requested documents and schedules

Assist with vendor compliance, insurance certificates, and contract documentation as needed



Collaboration & Support



Work directly with property managers to resolve tenant ledger issues, coding questions, AP timing, and cash needs

Communicate proactively with the Controller when issues arise or clarification is needed

Coordinate with external accountants, auditors, or tax preparers as requested

Assist with onboarding new properties into AppFolio and QBO



Required Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (CPA strongly preferred)

Minimum 4-6 years of experience in accounting or financial management, preferably in an investment or multi-entity environment

Hands-on experience with AppFolio (property management accounting system required)

Experience managing financials for multi-family real estate portfolios

Strong understanding of property accounting, rent rolls, AP workflows, and real estate GL

Solid understanding of GAAP and financial reporting standards

Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and documentation discipline

Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines

Comfortable asking questions and escalating issues appropriately



Preferred Qualifications



Experience in real estate, private equity, or multi-entity accounting

Exposure to property management systems and multi-family operations, with AppFolio expertise strongly preferred

Exposure to capital expenditure tracking and mortgage/loan accounting

Knowledge of 1099 processing and vendor compliance

Familiarity with private equity or real estate investment structures



What We Offer

Competitive salary 

Growth opportunities within a mission-driven investment company

An entrepreneurial leadership team and collaborative work environment

Exposure to real estate, franchise, and diversified investment ventures



Important Note

Do not apply if qualifications are not met, especially the required expertise in Streamline Portal.

title: Graphic Designer (Full-Time, Remote):
description:
Graphic Designer (Full-Time, Remote):



We are a modern organic marketing agency looking for a full-time Graphic Designer to join our team.



Our agency helps businesses grow using data-backed social media marketing, and we need someone who can create high-performing graphics and carousels for our clients’ social media pages and advertising campaigns.



This role is perfect for someone who is creative, detail-oriented, and comfortable using AI tools to design quickly and efficiently.



Responsibilities:



Your work will primarily involve designing visuals that help our clients grow their audience and promote their services.



This includes:



• Social media graphics

• Carousel posts for Instagram / LinkedIn

• Promotional graphics (sales, announcements, highlights)

• Ad creatives for marketing campaigns



Most designs will be based on content that is already performing well online, meaning you will often:



• Analyze high-performing posts from competitors

• Take inspiration from those designs

• Recreate and improve them using our branding and messaging



You will be working in a data-backed environment, meaning designs are created strategically based on what works — not randomly.



Important: AI Skills Required



We expect our designers to be modern designers who are comfortable using AI tools.



You will have access to unlimited AI tools, including tools like:



• Google Nano Pro

• AI image generation tools

• AI editing tools



In many cases, AI will allow you to create or modify graphics much faster than traditional design methods.



However, you should still be capable of making manual adjustments and edits when needed.



Most of the time you will combine:



• AI-generated visuals

• Inspiration from existing high-performing content

• Custom design adjustments

• Client branding



Requirements:



We are looking for someone who:



• Has strong graphic design skills

• Is comfortable using AI tools in their workflow

• Can follow branding guidelines

• Pays close attention to detail

• Works efficiently and independently

• Is hardworking and takes pride in their work



We value people who take their work seriously and consistently put in effort.



Work Schedule:

•Full-time

•Monday – Friday

•9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (Eastern Standard Timezone)



Compensation:

•$500 per month

•Includes 13th month pay.



Application Requirement (Important)



To apply, you must complete a short design assignment.



Create one data-backed social media graphic or carousel for the brand:



Product Prep



Product Prep teaches automotive finance managers how to sell more cars and warranties.



Your goal is to design a graphic or carousel that would perform well on social media for this audience.



You may:



• Use inspiration from existing posts in the industry

• Use AI tools to help create the design

• Apply your own design skills and creativity



Submit this design along with your application.



We are looking for candidates who clearly take time and effort in their work.



If your submission shows strong effort and skill, there is a very good chance you will be hired.



How to Apply



Please submit:



Your portfolio (if available)



Your completed Product Prep design assignment



A short introduction about yourself



We look forward to seeing your work.

mbers to ensure the smooth flow of maintenance services from start to finish.

title: DM Appointment Setter
description:
We run a world-class online fitness coaching company helping busy Asian men lose stubborn belly fat, build lean muscle, and stay in shape without cutting out the cultural foods they love.



Our brand and client base is growing fast. As a result, we are rapidly expanding our team and looking for a high-performance DM setter who knows how to turn conversations into booked calls so we can help even more people!



If you thrive in a results-driven environment and want uncapped earning potential, keep reading.



Compensation:



- Full-time: 40–50 hours per week

- Pay: $650 USD per month

- Commission: 3-5% of cash collected from every client you book who enrolls

- Expected Earnings: $800–$1,200+ per month



**Top performers earn significantly more. This is a performance-based role. Your income scales with your output.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



- Initiating conversations with new followers, story viewers, and engaged prospects

- Reaching out to warm and targeted outbound leads daily

- Using our scripts + frameworks while making conversations feel natural and human

- Asking intelligent qualifying questions

- Moving qualified prospects into booked sales calls

- Following up consistently with warm leads

- Tracking conversations and outcomes inside our CRM

- Maintaining our brand voice and communication standards

- You will be expected to generate volume while maintaining quality.



What We’re Looking For:



- Strong written English (clear, natural, professional — no grammar mistakes)

- Quick response speed and ability to handle multiple conversations at once

- 1–3+ years of experience as a DM setter (fitness industry preferred)

- Proven history of booking qualified calls that actually show up

- Reliable laptop + fast internet

- Comfortable sending 80–100+ high-quality messages per day

- Willing to work flexible hours, including weekends when needed

- Highly coachable and able to take feedback fast

- Competitive, disciplined, and motivated by performance

- We move quickly. You must be comfortable keeping up.



Why This Is a Big Opportunity:



- Work directly with a rapidly scaling online fitness coaching company with a passion for client results and excellence across the board

- Clear SOPs, scripts, and leadership support

- Real growth path for top performers (raises + leadership opportunities)

- Paid onboarding and training

- Remote position

- Be part of a team with high standards and long-term vision

- We value excellence, accountability, and growth.



How To Apply:



Send a short message replying to this job post explaining why you want to apply



**within 24-72 hours, all eligible applicants will be invited to an interview.



Looking forward to speaking with you!

title: US Accountant/Bookkeeper
description:
Are you a QuickBooks expert who thrives on bringing order to chaos?



 Do you have a proven track record of completing meticulous accounting cleanups under tight deadlines?



Can you identify and rectify mis-postings and discrepancies with minimal oversight?



Are you ready to tackle high-stakes challenges in trust accounting that could impact a law firm’s compliance?



Final question: When faced with a challenge, do you get excited or run away?





The Law Offices of Tresa A. Sadler, PLLC is a distinguished legal powerhouse located in Mill Creek, Washington. With a strong emphasis on family law and estate planning, the firm provides compassionate guidance and skilled advocacy across divorce, custody, and complex asset divisions. Tresa A. Sadler has built a reputation for delivering personalized service tailored to each client's unique needs.



Our firm serves many families across Snohomish and King Counties, expertly handling high-asset cases with precision and professionalism. With years of experience, we pride ourselves on our ability to navigate complicated legal landscapes, offering clear strategies that are both efficient and effective. Whether it's crafting advanced estate plans or representing clients in delicate tribal court matters, we are committed to protecting what matters most to our clients.



The Global Bookkeeper role at the Law Offices of Tresa A. Sadler, PLLC is a critical one, designed to stabilize our financial operations and ensure accurate accounting practices. This position is not just about maintaining numbers; it’s about enabling the firm to continue delivering exceptional legal services while maintaining compliance and financial integrity, especially regarding trust accounts. You will play a pivotal role in transforming our financial chaos into order, affecting our clients’ trust and the firm's professional standing.



What you’ll do:

QuickBooks Cleanup: Conduct a thorough audit and cleaning of existing QuickBooks files, identifying misclassified transactions and correcting broken reconciliations.

Trust Accounting Compliance: Manage IOLTA account handling, trust transfers, and three-way reconciliations to mitigate compliance risks.

Systems Stabilization: Clarify revenue and expense tracking, ensuring accurate books in preparation for tax filing.

Documentation: Provide clear, comprehensive documentation of corrections and establish processes for maintaining clean books.

Future Preparation: Prepare the firm for a system migration with a clean financial slate, ensuring successful transition to MyCase.



What we’re looking for:

QuickBooks Expertise: Proven experience with QuickBooks Online cleanup projects; individuals who are certified are highly preferred.

Trust Accounting Mastery: Demonstrated expertise in three-way reconciliations and compliance with IOLTA requirements, with a strong understanding of the high-risk nature of trust accounting and the importance of accuracy in maintaining regulatory compliance.

Autonomy: This role is well-suited for someone who works confidently and independently, can take initial direction and run with it, and keeps the team informed through clear and timely updates.

Analytical Skills: Strong capability to diagnose financial discrepancies and implement effective solutions.

Communication: Ability to clearly explain financial corrections and provide needed updates to the team.

English Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal English communication skills to collaborate effectively with the team and clearly present financial findings.

Project-Based Engagement: Open to a 3–4 month contract role focused on completing a defined accounting cleanup project, with the potential for additional work depending on future needs.

Remote Work Readiness: Able to work independently in a remote environment, maintaining consistent productivity, reliability, and clear communication without the need for close supervision.

 



Why you should work here:

High-Impact Role: Play a crucial part in a project with immediate and visible outcomes, enhancing the firm’s compliance and integrity.

Professional Autonomy: Enjoy the freedom to run your projects with minimal oversight and direct access to leadership for swift decision-making.

Meaningful Work: Contribute to a firm that deeply values the precision and reliability of its financial operations, ultimately impacting client trust and firm reputation.

Professional Growth: Opportunity to engage with complex financial systems, perfect for enhancing your accounting portfolio. 

Monthly Compensation: $1,750 - $2,000 per month



Apply directly: 



Join us at the Law Offices of Tresa A. Sadler, PLLC and become a cornerstone of our financial operations. As our bookkeeper, you'll make a significant impact by ensuring accuracy and compliance, ultimately supporting the invaluable services we provide to our clients. If you are ready to bring your expertise to a firm that values precision and integrity, we invite you to apply.

built to move.



We run a centralized shared-services model across growth, media, creative, product, and ops.

We’re well-capitalized, actively acquiring brands, and each brand follows a 3-year scale-and-exit

playbook. Our roots are in Amazon, and TikTok Shops is our next breakout channel.



Our mission: To build brands that leave lasting impressions — and exit them at their peak.

Our values: Competitive Greatness • Speed to Execution • Team Empowerment • Relentless

Ownership



Role Overview

As Pearl West scales across multiple brands and fulfillment channels, we’re creating a

dedicated Order Fulfillment Specialist to own the critical last mile: from the 
nt a product

leaves our warehouse to the 
nt it lands in a customer’s hands. This role is the operational

bridge between Supply Chain and Customer Service — eliminating ownership gaps, reducing

fulfillment failures, and keeping both teams focused on what they do best.



This is a high-ownership, execution-first role. You’ll monitor orders in real time, identify stalled or

failed shipments before customers do, escalate issues to the right people, and hold 3PL

partners accountable. You won’t wait to be told there’s a problem — you’ll be the one who finds

it first.



T H E H A N D O F F L I N E

Supply Chain owns: Procurement ? Warehouse ? 3PL Pick-Up

This role owns: 3PL Dispatch ? Carrier Tracking ? Confirmed Delivery to Customer

Customer Service owns: Post-Delivery ? Customer Contact ? Resolution



Key Responsibilities

Fulfillment Monitoring

• Monitor all open orders across fulfillment channels in real time, with a focus on tracking

movement, carrier handoffs, and delivery confirmation.

• Proactively identify stalled orders (no tracking movement for 48+ hours) before they

generate CS tickets or customer complaints.

• Flag fulfillment patterns — bulk carrier failures, pick-up delays, wrong items shipped —

to Supply Chain leadership and CS within defined SLAs.

• Serve as the primary point of contact between 3PL vendors and internal teams for all

post-dispatch, pre-delivery order issues.

Escalation Ownership

• Own the escalation process when fulfillment failures are identified: document the issue,

quantify the impact (order count, date range, failure type), and route to the right

stakeholder with urgency.

• Provide CS with accurate, timely status updates on affected orders so agents can

confidently respond to customers still waiting.

• Maintain a log of escalations and resolutions to support pattern recognition and process

improvement.

3PL & Carrier Accountability

• Track 3PL performance against defined SLAs and flag recurring failures (pick-up delays,

scan gaps, misroutes) to Supply Chain leadership.

• Lead chargeback recovery efforts with 3PL partners for fulfillment failures within your

scope, documenting affected orders and coordinating with Supply Chain for formal

claims.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

• Act as the daily operational bridge between Supply Chain and Customer Service —

ensuring both teams have what they need without crossing into each other’s lanes.

• Participate in weekly L10 standups and report on key fulfillment metrics with real

numbers — not “metrics stable” summaries.

• Support OMS monitoring and translate data into actionable insight for leadership.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

• Stalled Order Rate — Target: < 1> 95% of orders picked up within agreed carrier

window. Upstream failure prevention.

• Order Issue Resolution Rate — Target: > 90% of flagged orders resolved or rerouted

within 48 hours. Customer experience and chargeback reduction.

• Chargeback Recovery Rate — Target: 100% of eligible 3PL failures documented and

submitted. Direct cost recovery tied to operations.



Success Benchmarks (
Days)

First 30 Days — Learn the Landscape

• Gain full access to and working knowledge of OMS and all active fulfillment channels

across brands.

• Complete a full audit of current open orders and identify any existing stalled shipments

or unresolved 3PL issues.

• Build working relationships with Supply Chain lead and CS Team Lead to understand

current pain points and communication gaps.

• Shadow existing escalation workflows and document where handoffs currently break

down.



First 60 Days — Own the Process

• Fully own daily order monitoring across all active fulfillment channels with zero reliance

on CS or SC to surface issues.

• Establish the escalation protocol with CS and SC — both teams know exactly when and

how to loop you in.

• Begin tracking and presenting stalled order rate, resolution time, and 3PL SLA

compliance at weekly L10.

• Identify the first chargeback recovery opportunity and initiate documentation with Supply

Chain.



First 90 Days — Drive the Number

• Stalled order rate consistently below 1% with a documented system for daily monitoring

and early detection.

• Fulfillment escalations no longer land in CS’s lap — agents are responding to customers

with accurate info already provided.

• At least one completed chargeback recovery cycle submitted with full documentation.

• Leadership has full visibility into fulfillment health through weekly reports — no P&L

surprises.



Required Skills & Qualifications

Must-Have

• E-commerce operations experience — DTC or marketplace, not brick and mortar.

• Amazon platform fluency — Seller Central, FBA/FBM, or MCF at working proficiency.

• Order management proficiency — comfortable navigating OMS platforms and

interpreting tracking data at volume.

• Google Sheets — strong working proficiency for tracking, reporting, and flagging data

independently.

• 3PL coordination experience — you’ve held logistics partners accountable, not just

monitored them.

• Clear written communication — you escalate concisely and without fluff.



Nice-to-Have

• TikTok Shop fulfillment experience — a strong plus as this is our fastest-growing

channel.

• Experience in health, wellness, or pet product categories.

• Familiarity with chargeback recovery processes with 3PL or carrier partners.

• Startup or high-growth DTC background — you build systems, you don’t just follow

them.



Experience

• 2+ years in an e-commerce operations, fulfillment coordination, or supply chain support

role.

• Direct hands-on experience with 3PL providers and carrier networks — not just visibility

tools.

• No specific degree required. Relevant supply chain or logistics certifications are a plus.



Who Should Apply?

? Apply if you…

? Spot a stalled order in a dashboard before anyone asks you to look.

? Thrive in high-volume, fast-moving environments where data tells you what needs fixing

today.

? Can escalate a 3PL failure at 7am and have a clear update to CS by 10am without being

chased.

? Understand the stakes of fulfillment failures on DTC revenue — because you’ve lived

them.

? Build your own tracking systems rather than waiting for one to be handed to you.



???? Do not apply if you…

? Come from brick and mortar or traditional retail with no e-commerce experience.

? Need daily direction on what to monitor or fix — this role requires self-driven execution.

? Are more comfortable escalating problems than owning their resolution.

? Prefer slow-moving corporate environments with clearly defined processes for every

scenario.



Why Join Pearl West?

• Real ownership — your stalled order rate shows up on the P&L. You’ll see the direct

impact of your work every month.

• High-growth environment — six brands, multiple channels, active acquisitions. You’ll

never be bored.

• A team that moves — no approval chains for common-sense decisions. If you see a

problem, you own it.

• Build the role — this position is new. You’ll define how it runs and grow with it as we

scale.



Compensation & Benefits

• Salary Range: $
depending on experience

• Work Arrangement: Fully remote

• Health & Wellness Benefits: Per Pearl West standard benefits package • Growth Path: Natural track toward Fulfillment Manager or SC Operations Lead as Pearl West acquires more brands.



How to Apply

- Submit your application through this link:

 and Instagram for multiple clients across various industries. You must be data-driven, creative, and able to deliver measurable results.



Responsibilities:



Build and launch Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns from scratch, including audience targeting, ad creatives, copywriting, and budget setup

Strong analytical and communication skills

title: Customer Service Associate
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Compensation: $600-$800/month

Working Schedule: Tuesday-Saturday, 4AM-12NN PH time, including occasional weekends or holidays as needed, and subject to change to GY shift after the training period

Reports To: HR/CS Director



About Pearl West Group

Pearl West Group is a fast-growing eCommerce investment and operating company that scales digital consumer brands through data-driven performance marketing and operational excellence.



We’re hiring Customer Service Associate to join our Customer Experience team on a 3-month contract—with the possibility of full-time employment or promotion based on performance.



Role Overview

As a Customer Service Associate, you’ll be the first point of contact for our customers—resolving inquiries, handling order issues, and ensuring a smooth experience across our DTC brands. You’ll manage tickets via Freshdesk, providing timely, accurate, and empathetic responses.



This role is ideal for someone with strong non-voice customer service experience, excellent written English, and the ability to handle multiple tickets efficiently while maintaining professionalism and accuracy.



Key Responsibilities

Respond promptly and professionally to customer inquiries via Freshdesk 
 and chat).

Handle order updates, returns, exchanges, refunds, and product inquiries.

Coordinate with internal teams and 3PL partners to resolve shipping or fulfillment issues.

Maintain accurate and complete customer interaction records.

Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements to processes or templates.

Meet or exceed performance targets for response time, resolution rate, and customer satisfaction.

Perform other customer experience–related tasks as assigned.

(Responsibilities are not limited to the above and may evolve based on team needs and performance.)

Requirements (Plug-and-Play Skills)



Category

Requirement



Experience

Minimum 2 years of customer service experience, with at least 1 year in non-voice support 
 or chat).



Tools

Familiarity with Freshdesk, Zendesk, or similar helpdesk platforms.



Communication

Excellent written English—clear, empathetic, and professional tone.



Typing Speed

At least 40 words per minute with high accuracy.



Multitasking & Focus

Can manage multiple tickets and maintain quality under pressure.



Integrity & Accountability

Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently in a remote environment.



Availability

Can work Tuesday–Saturday, 4 AM–12 NN PHT, including occasional weekends or holidays as needed.



Nice-to-Have Skills

Experience with Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, or TikTok Shop

Familiarity with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets)

Understanding of CSAT, response time, and resolution KPIs

Experience working with 3PL or fulfillment partners

Pet owner (or has experience caring for pets), with a strong understanding of pet owners’ concerns and emotional connection to their pets.



Performance Metrics (Success in the Role)

First Response Time: < 24> 90% within SLA



Why Join Pearl West Group

Be part of a fast-growing eCommerce team managing multiple DTC brands.

Gain hands-on exposure to Freshdesk and real customer experience operations.

Fully remote role with performance-based incentives.

Opportunity for promotion or full-time employment based on performance.



Application Process

title: Executive Virtual Assistant to CEO
description:

Are you SUPER ORGANIZED and Detail Oriented? 



Are you a LEADER in your own right and enjoy keeping your CEO on track?

We’re not so much into temporary hookups, nor we’ll treat you as a remedy to this “gap” (position) that we’re trying to fill. We’re in this together for the long run! So if you’re someone looking for a LONG TERM CAREER, here’s the benefits you can earn: 



HMO

PTO

Internet allowance

Generator 

Performance Reviews

Must be willing to work US hours.  You have at least 2 years experience working US hours.



We want a long-term relationship with benefits that not many can give - Performance reviews, HMO, PTO, Internet allowance, etc. If you don’t want this **please do NOT apply**





RESPONSIBILITIES FOR THIS JOB INCLUDE:



Calendar Management- create, manage and streamline CEO’s time and scheduling systems, prioritizing appointments and working directly with executives, customers, and other partners & tea
mbers as necessary

Support meeting preparation and follow up including allocating appropriate time slots, ensuring awareness/preparation, and following up on staff actions

Coordinates onsite & offsite meetings and logistics

Reviews and answers mail,
 and other inquiries and determines when executive action is required.

Interfaces with various levels of management and customers. Directs inquiries and problems to staff members for response and resolution as necessary.

Independently prepare/ edit PowerPoint presentations from rough drafts. Experience with sales presentations and webinars is a plus.

Recognizes and effectively handles confidential, proprietary information on a routine basis

Executive Assistant establishes, develops, maintains and updates the filing system for the executive team. Retrieves information from files when needed.

Work independently and within a team on ongoing projects.

Ability to multitask, and work effectively under pressure and deadlines

Executive Virtual Assistant to the CEO must have the ability to take initiative, organize and complete projects with minimal direction and micromanaging

EXPERT Project Management skills - prioritizing tasks & projects

Filing & organizing financial paperwork

Create, manage and streamline organizational systems

File & organize intellectual property, electronic files, syncing files, etc

Arrange domestic and international travel schedules, reservations and logistics that optimize executive's time. Upon completion of travel, prepare expense reports and ensure submission in a timely fashion.

Able to show up & execute, anticipate our needs – ability to think 10 steps ahead vs wait for things to be delegated to you

Support CEO in content creation, transcription services, creating & managing intellectual property, etc

Run weekly, monthly & quarterly reports for CEO to make strategic decisions

Personal tasks as assigned by the CEO



THE IDEAL CANDIDATE:



Excellent time management & project management skills

You have an Executive Assisting SYSTEM that you've developed over the years

Tech-savvy and proficient in all major platforms

You enjoy leading in a supportive, “behind the scenes” kind of way

Clear, focused, super organized, grounded, efficient, achieve outcomes FAST

Intuitive- ability to anticipate people’s needs before they ask

High level of professionalism, grace and business etiquette. Due to the confidential and sensitive nature of information, discretion is a MUST

Resourceful, proactive & takes initiative

Quick learner & flexibility- ability to engage in a number of detailed tasks at once and handle the demands from the CEO

Excellent communication skills - ability to work cohesively with different tea
mbers and personality types



Experience with technology & tools:

EXPERT Level with Project Management (ex: Asana, Trello, Monday, Clickup)

Time Doctor (or other time tracking systems)

EXPERT Level with Gdrive and Gsuite tools 

Slack 



NEXT STEPS:



If this position sounds like YOU and you’re jumping for JOY at this opportunity, follow these instructions very carefully:



Send your updated resume/CV and cover letter answering the following questions to 



What attracts YOU to this position & why are you the BEST candidate?

What QUALITIES make you a great Executive Virtual Assistant to the CEO?

How many YEARS of experience do you have as an Executive Assistant?

How many YEARS of experience do you have working US hours?  



**This is no time to be bashful… put your best foot forward and really sell yourself... if you don’t, no one else will ;)



Thanks and GOOD LUCK!

title: Senior Accountant
description:
This is a full time employee role. Not a contractor.



We're currently seeking a skilled Senior Accountant to join our growing team!



Join our team as a full-time employee, where you can contribute remotely while benefiting from a collaborative work environment. Please note that this is a full-time position, not a contractor role. During the first 90 days, we ask that you align your work hours with your manager's time zone, which includes working some hours during the 10pm-6am night shift Philippine time. After this period, based on your performance, you'll work with your director to create a schedule that includes a four-hour overlap.



The primary role of this position is to serve various industries through our Bookkeeping and Accounting Services.



If you're hard-working and dedicated to building your career, Keepingcount is a perfect match that offers you a career with both purpose and opportunity.



Work Experience:

• 3-5 years of relevant, hands-on accounting & bookkeeping experience.



Candidates should have experience:

• Managing a team

• Coordinating the month close process

• Communicating financial information and results to key stakeholders

• Managing a variety of tasks with competing priorities and deadlines



Skills:

• Strong written and verbal communication skills: Ability to explain complex things simply

• Client and project management: Demonstrated the ability to manage multiple clients and projects to successful completion on time.

• Collaboration: Demonstrated the ability to works effectively with others, both internally and externally to achieve goals.

• Initiative & Follow Through: Highly motivated, self-learner, and able to work independently



Technical Competencies:

• Skilled in Microsoft Excel

• Gusto, Sage Intacct, 
, Divvy, Quickbooks

• Skilled at
 management via Microsoft Outlook

• Skilled in communicating remotely (via phone, teleconference, or
)

• Skilled in learning new technologies and systems

• Compensation and Benefits



Education: A Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, business OR an Associate’s degree in finance is required.



Competitive Salary: DOE



Benefits:

• Many internal promotion opportunities

• Remote role with flexible work schedule



About Us:

The KeepingCount group of companies provides accounting, bookkeeping, tax advisory, and CFO services to businesses in a variety of industry verticals such as real estate, life sciences, e-commerce, and more. We understand the uniqueness of these industries and work with our clients to help create the perfect scope to meet your needs. KeepingCount takes care of all financial and regulatory details so that you, the industry professional, can stay focused on your goals.



Why Join Our Team?

We know that you have many employment opportunities, however, few can match the unique and rewarding career that KeepingCount offers. We are committed to providing you the following:

• Clear Career Development & Opportunity – We love to promote from within.

• Culture, Comradery, & Community – We believe that work can and should be fun.

• Mission-Driven Values, Meaningful Work – We truly believe in our core values – Conscientious, Gracious, and Discipline – they are what guide us as a company.

• Work/Life Harmony – We are proud to offer flexible work schedules and a work from home opportunity.

• Global Team Experience – We work closely with our international tea
mbers who all share our same passion for serving our clients in bookkeeping, accounting, and tax services.

title: Manager of Accounting
description:
Full-Time Employee (Not a Contractor Role)



Join our team as an Accounting Manager, where you’ll play a key role in leading the day-to-day operations of your team while supporting our clients with accuracy, professionalism, and care. This is a remote, full-time position based in the Philippines, with an initial focus on aligning with your manager's time zone.



About the Role



As a Accounting Manager, you’ll be responsible for ensuring the accuracy and timely completion of all accounting tasks owned by your team. You’ll also provide leadership, mentorship, and support to junior staff to help them reach their fullest potential.



Key Responsibilities



Supervisory Duties:



• Manage and mentor junior staff working on account reconciliation, payroll, accounts payable, accounts receivable, sales tax, and more

• Conduct performance evaluations and provide coaching

• Lead training efforts for new hires and ongoing staff development

• Foster a positive, professional, and collaborative team environment

Client & Team Management:



• Own timely and accurate completion of all tasks for assigned clients

• Coordinate internal work assignments and team priorities

• Manage projects and deadlines using our Project Management platform

• Hold the team accountable for quality and timeliness

• Oversee the preparation of financial statements and client reports

Technical & Process Support:



• Verify, allocate, post, and reconcile general ledger accounts

• Produce error-free accounting reports and analyze financial data

• Identify areas for process improvement and lead implementation

• Provide support for audits and tax matters

• Participate in setting standards and improving workflows

• Develop documentation and strengthen internal controls



What We’re Looking For

• Strong analytical skills and thorough knowledge of accounting principles

• Excellent organizational and leadership abilities

• Experience in managing accounting workflows and team supervision

• Ability to adapt, take initiative, and lead process improvements

• Familiarity with project management and accounting software tools

• Must have U.S. accounting experience



Work Schedule

This is a full-time, remote position for candidates based in the Philippines.



• Initial 90 days: Work hours must align with your manager’s time zone, which includes working some hours during the 10:00 PM – 6:00 AM night shift (Philippine time)

• Post-90 days: Based on performance, you’ll work with your director to set a schedule that includes a 4-hour overlap with your manager’s time zone



Compensation & Benefits

• Competitive salary, dependent on experience (DOE)

• Opportunities for internal promotions and career growth

• 15 days of paid time off (PTO) annually

• Paid Philippine holidays off

• Medical, dental, and vision insurance offered

title: Appointment Setter | Calls, SMS, Social | Inbound + Outbound |Base + Performance Pay
description:
Overview

We’re building a SaaS platform in the real estate space and are actively looking for a sharp, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to step in immediately and support appointment setting and lead conversion.



You’ll work directly with leadership to manage leads, book qualified calls, and keep the pipeline moving. This role is for someone who can think, optimize conversations, and improve results, not just follow scripts.



We are looking to fill this role quickly with the right person.



?



What You’ll Do

Engage with leads via SMS,
, chat, and social media

Book and confirm appointments

Follow up with unbooked leads and reschedule no-shows

Manage and update CRM (GoHighLevel)

Qualify leads at a basic level and route appropriately

Communicate updates via Slack

Identify and improve gaps in conversations

Call leads when needed to drive bookings



?



Who You Are

Strong communicator who can guide conversations to a booking

Experience in appointment setting or lead follow-up

Comfortable with GoHighLevel or similar tools

Organized, responsive, and able to manage multiple conversations

Understands speed and timing with inbound leads

?

?

?

?

?

Resume

?

?

title: Video Editor
description:
We are launching a weekly vlog series and we need a skilled video editor to bring it to life. We want to put out one polished episode per week, every week. 



What You'll Do

- Edit raw vlog footage into a clean, engaging 20-minute episode each week

- Add intro/outro sequences, lower thirds, and on-screen text

- Incorporate music, sound design, and audio leveling

- Color correct and maintain a consistent visual tone throughout the series

- Deliver files on a set weekly schedule, ready to publish

- Incorporate feedback quickly and efficiently



What We're Looking For

- Proven experience editing long-form video content (vlogs, YouTube, documentary-style)

- Proficiency in Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

- Strong storytelling instincts; you know how to keep an audience watching

- Dependable and deadline-driven; weekly delivery is non-negotiable

- Portfolio with at least one example of long-form edited content

title: Client Success Manager / Account Manager (Digital Marketing Agency)
description:
Job Overview:

We are looking for a proactive and people-focused Client Success Manager to be the main point of contact for our clients. You will handle onboarding, communication, reporting, and relationship management for clients receiving Meta Ads services. Your job is to make sure every client feels informed, valued, and confident in the results we're delivering — so our media buyers can focus on running great campaigns.



Responsibilities:



Serve as the primary point of contact for assigned clients

Onboard new clients — collect assets, set expectations, and walk them through the process

Send weekly and monthly performance reports with clear explanations of results

Schedule and conduct regular client check-in calls (Zoom/Google Meet)

Relay client feedback and requests to the media buying and creative team

Monitor client satisfaction and proactively address concerns before they escalate

Track campaign timelines and deliverables to ensure nothing falls through the cracks

Maintain organized client records, notes, and communication logs

Assist with client retention and renewal conversations





Requirements:



Minimum 1–2 years of experience in a client-facing role (account management, customer success, or similar)

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Comfortable on video calls with clients (Zoom, Google Meet)

Basic understanding of digital marketing and paid advertising (Meta Ads knowledge is a plus)

Experience working in a marketing agency or remote team environment preferred

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple clients at once

Proficient in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail) and project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, or Trello)

Able to read and explain basic ad performance metrics (ROAS, CTR, CPL, etc.)





Nice to Have:



Experience using reporting tools like AgencyAnalytics or Google Looker Studio

Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, etc.)

Background in sales or upselling additional services to existing clients

Experience with client onboarding SOPs and documentation

title: Transaction Coordinator (California Real Estate)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Transaction Coordinator who knows California real estate contracts inside and out. This is not an entry-level role. If you don’t already have hands-on experience with California transactions, this is not the right fit.



What We’re Looking For



* Proven experience as a Transaction Coordinator in California real estate

* Strong working knowledge of CAR (California Association of Realtors) forms

* Strong working knowledge of SFAR (San Francisco Association of Realtors) forms

* Familiarity with PRDS contracts

* Ability to prepare, review, and send contracts and disclosures without hand-holding

* Reliable, fast internet connection and strong computer skills

* High attention to detail, organized, and responsive



If you need to be trained on the basics of contracts or disclosures, please do not apply.



What You’ll Be Doing



* Prepare listing agreements and disclosure packages

* Draft and assist with purchase agreements and offers

* Manage compliance and file organization

* Send documents for signature using DocuSign

* Coordinate timelines and ensure all paperwork is complete and accurate

* Assist with resale disclosure packages and manage transactions from start to finish



The goal is simple: take this off our plate so we can focus on clients and growing the business.



Tools and Systems (Preferred, Not Required)



* DocuSign or similar e-sign platform (you should already have access or know how to get it)

* Slack

* Asana

* Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

* Side App (nice to have, easy to learn if you know CAR contracts)



How We’ll Evaluate You

We move fast and hire based on real ability, not resumes.



If selected for an interview, you’ll complete a quick practical test:



* Prepare a Residential Listing Agreement for a sample property

* Assemble and send a full disclosure package for signature



If you know what you’re doing, this will be easy.



What Matters Most



* Experience with California contracts (this is the biggest thing)

* Speed, accuracy, and reliability

* Ability to work independently without constant direction

* No drama, no excuses, just solid work



If you’re experienced, detail-oriented, and want consistent work with a serious team, apply.

title: Meta Ads Creative Strategist & Designer (Facebook & Instagram)
description:
Job Overview:

We are looking for a talented and strategic Ad Creative Strategist & Designer to produce high-converting ad creatives for
 and Instagram campaigns across multiple clients. You will be responsible for designing static images, carousels, video thumbnails, and writing ad copy that drives clicks and conversions. You must understand what makes people stop scrolling and take action.



Responsibilities:



Design scroll-stopping ad creatives including static images, carousel ads, video thumbnails, and short video ads

Write compelling ad copy — headlines, primary text, and CTAs — tailored to each client's audience and offer

Develop creative concepts and strategies based on client goals, target audience, and funnel stage

Collaborate with the Media Buyer to test multiple creative variations (A/B testing)

Analyze creative performance data and iterate based on what's working

Maintain brand consistency across all client ad creatives

Manage multiple client projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines

Stay current with Meta ad trends, formats, and best practices





Requirements:



Minimum 2 years of experience creating ad creatives specifically for
 and Instagram

Strong portfolio showing Meta ad creatives that generated real results

Proficiency in Canva, Adobe Photoshop, or Illustrator

Ability to write persuasive, conversion-focused ad copy

Understanding of direct response marketing and advertising psychology

Experience working with multiple clients or in an agency setting

Able to work independently, manage time well, and meet deadlines

Strong eye for design, layout, typography, and color



Nice to Have:



Video editing experience (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar)

Experience with UGC-style ad creatives

Understanding of Meta Ads Manager and creative performance metrics (CTR, Hook Rate, Thumb Stop Rate)

Knowledge of different industries (e-commerce, local business, coaching, etc.)

title: Remote HOA Admin / Operations Specialist (CINC Systems)
description:
**About the Role**



We’re hiring a Remote HOA Admin / Operations Specialist with CINC Systems experience to support a consulting team that works with HOA management companies across the U.S.



This is not a traditional HOA admin role. You will not be managing homeowners or communities directly.

Instead, you’ll operate as a generalist supporting consultants, helping execute work inside CINC, manage recruiting workflows, and keep client projects organized behind the scenes.



If you’ve worked in HOA/property management and enjoy being the person who keeps everything running smoothly, this role is a strong fit.



**What You’ll Do**



1. CINC Systems Support (Primary Focus)

  - Work inside CINC Systems to support consulting projects

  - Enter, clean up, and maintain data (owners, associations, ledgers, notes)

  - Run reports, exports, and audits as requested

  - Complete follow-up work after client or training calls

  - Document workflows and updates as processes evolve

  - Support consultants in improving how clients use CINC



2. Recruiting & Pipeline Support

  - Manage candidates inside our ATS (update stages, track progress)

  - Prepare organized candidate packets (resumes, notes, video links)

  - Coordinate and manage video interview links and files

  - Keep pipelines accurate and up to date

  - Assist with post-project summaries and debrief notes



3. Client & Candidate Coordination (Back-End)

  - Draft and send
s, schedule calls, and manage follow-ups

  - Track deadlines and next steps across multiple projects

  - Ensure client-facing materials are clean, accurate, and professional

  - Keep internal systems organized so nothing falls through the cracks



4. Process Improvement & Documentation

  - Turn one-off fixes into repeatable systems

  - Document SOPs as workflows are refined

  - Participate in team debriefs and suggest improvements

  - Look for ways to improve speed, clarity, and consistency



**Requirements (Must-Have)**



  - Hands-on CINC Systems experience (required)

  - 1–2+ years in HOA, property management, or similar admin role

  - Strong attention to detail and organization

  - Excellent written English communication

  - Comfortable using multiple tools (ATS, Google Workspace, video tools, etc.)

  - Ability to manage multiple projects at once



**Nice to Have**

 

 - Experience supporting recruiting or hiring workflows

  - Experience working across multiple systems or tools

  - Familiarity with SOP creation or process documentation

  - Experience working with U.S.-based teams



**Who This Role is a Fit For**



You’ll do well here if you:

  - Take ownership and follow through without being chased

  - Stay organized across multiple moving pieces

  - Think in systems, not just tasks

  - Catch mistakes before they become problems

  - Want to grow into higher-level operations or consulting support



**This Role is NOT a Fit If**

   - You need constant direction to stay on task

   - You struggle to manage multiple priorities at once

   - You’re uncomfortable learning new systems quickly

   - You prefer purely repetitive work without problem-solving



**How to Apply (Required)**



Submit ALL of the following:

1. PDF Resume

 2. 2–3 minute video intro (Loom or Drive link)

 3. Answers to:

    - What specific tasks have you performed in CINC?

    - Describe a time you managed multiple projects at once



???? Include the word “Operator” in your subject line.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Executive Assistant / Operations Coordinator for Real Estate Agent
description:
We’re hiring a high-level Executive Assistant / Operations Coordinator to support the founder and agents of a fast-moving residential real estate team in California.



You will work closely with 3–5 active agents, helping coordinate listings, vendors, schedules, communication, marketing logistics, and daily operations across multiple properties and transactions at once.



This is not a basic admin VA role.

You will act as a remote operations partner — keeping projects organized, timelines on track, vendors coordinated, and communication clear so listings launch on time and clients feel supported.



You will be virtually “shadowing” the founder throughout the day — tracking tasks, capturing follow-ups, coordinating people, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



About the Company



RISE Homes is a boutique residential real estate team based in San Mateo, California (San Francisco Bay Area).



We specialize in complex property sales including probate, trust, and high-coordination listings that involve many vendors, timelines, and marketing steps.



We operate at a very high standard of organization, execution, and client service.

Our team manages multiple listings simultaneously across the Bay Area.



Your Core Role

Your job is to keep listings, agents, vendors, and operations organized and moving forward every day.

You will coordinate people, track timelines, manage tasks, and maintain systems across multiple properties and projects at once.

You are the person ensuring nothing is missed.



Responsibilities

- Listing & Vendor Coordination (Remote Oversight)

- Schedule and coordinate painters, stagers, cleaners, flooring installers, photographers, inspectors, and contractors

- Track listing preparation timelines from start to market launch

- Request and organize bids, proposals, and availability

- Confirm vendor appointments and readiness before milestones

- Coordinate lockbox, signage, inspection, and access logistics with local field staff

- Maintain listing checklists and status trackers

- Communicate progress clearly to agents and team

(You coordinate and manage remotely — you do not perform fieldwork.)



Agent & Client Communication Support

- Draft listing updates and status
s to clients and agents

- Track requests, questions, and follow-ups

- Assist with scheduling showings, inspections, walkthroughs, and meetings

- Maintain organized communication threads and decisions

- Ensure clients feel informed throughout listing and escrow timelines



Operations & Administrative Coordination

- Manage calendars across agents and listings

- Maintain task boards, trackers, SOPs, and workflows

- Organize Google Drive files and naming structures

- Track transaction deadlines and milestones

- Maintain vendor lists and service records

- Identify workflow improvements and organization needs



Marketing & Listing Logistics

- Coordinate marketing materials (brochures, flyers, postcards, signage)

- Track deadlines for print and digital marketing pieces

- Organize property media (photos, videos, floor plans, 3D tours)

- Coordinate property website and marketing asset readiness

- Support event and outreach preparation

- Coordinate with marketing VAs and designers



Financial & Documentation Support

- Track listing invoices and vendor expenses

- Organize receipts and reimbursement documentation

- Maintain listing cost trackers and records

- Prepare documentation for bookkeeping

- Support transaction file organization



Systems & Platforms You Will Use

Our operations run across listings, transactions, marketing, and finance — comfort managing multiple platforms is essential.

Daily tools include:

- Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets)

- Slack

- Asana

- Zoom

- DocuSign

- Follow Up Boss (CRM)

- 

- CAR / ZipForms transaction documents

- MLS systems (MLSListings / SFARMLS – viewing & coordination)

- Canva (marketing coordination)

- Corefact (print marketing)

- Luxury Presence (property websites)

- Media storage / file systems



You will also coordinate information across:

- QuickBooks Online (expense tracking support)

- Gusto / payroll coordination support

- Stripe / payment coordination

- Banking / expense documentation

Familiarity with productivity and automation tools (Zapier, Calendly, Loom, ChatGPT, etc.) is a plus.



Required Skills

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Extremely organized and detail-oriented

- Strong follow-through and reliability

- Able to manage multiple priorities and timelines

- Proactive and self-directed

- Comfortable coordinating many people and tasks

- Tech-savvy and fast learner

- Professional communication style



Experience Preferred

- Real estate, property management, or transaction coordination

- Operations or executive assistant work

- Vendor or project coordination

- Marketing coordination or admin support

- Bookkeeping or expense tracking support

Real estate experience is helpful but not required if you learn quickly.



Work Schedule: Full-time

Must overlap with California business hours (Pacific Time)

Long-term role



This Role Is NOT

A basic data-entry VA

A passive task-taker

A customer service agent

A marketing strategist



This is a high-trust operations coordination role supporting active real estate listings and agents.



Who Will Succeed Here

- Highly organized and structured

- Detail-focused

- Proactive and dependable

- Calm under pressure

- Comfortable with fast pace

- Able to manage complexity

- Proud of accurate, high-quality work



Success in This Role Looks Like

- Listings stay organized and on timeline

- Vendors and schedules are coordinated smoothly

- Agents feel supported and informed

- Clients receive clear communication

- Tasks and deadlines are never missed

- Operations feel structured and predictable



To apply please include:



1. Resume

2. Short introduction

3. Relevant coordination or EA experience

4. Tools/platforms you’ve used

5. Internet speed + backup plan

6. Expected monthly salary (PHP)

7. Availability (PH time)



We are hiring for a long-term role with growth potential.

title: Business Development Representative
description:
We’re looking for a Business Development Representative to join our growing team! You’ll call warm leads and qualify them into showroom appointments. Candidates should be motivated, diligent workers with a talent for gathering information and posing questions.

title: Virtual Assistant - Article Account Management (RSS + MRSS)
description:
Virtual Assistant – AI Content & WordPress Specialist (30 Articles/Day KPI)



Part-Time | Remote 



About the Role

We are looking for a fast-paced, detail-oriented Content Management Specialist to join our digital operations team. You will be responsible for a high-volume workflow that involves downloading video assets from TikTok/YouTube, generating AI-assisted articles, and publishing them to WordPress with 100% accuracy in metadata and linking.



This is a high-output role with a strict KPI of 30 completed articles per day.



Key Responsibilities

Asset Management: Identify and download video content and thumbnails from partners (e.g., Devour Power, Luke Martin, Patty Plates) using TikTok/YouTube downloaders.



File Organization: Upload assets to Google Drive using strict naming conventions (Parent folders and files must match asset titles exactly).



AI Content Generation: Use Gemini Gems and AI prompts to transform video assets into high-quality blog articles.



WordPress Publishing: Create posts, format text, and ensure the "Author" and "Category" fields match the creator perfectly (No errors allowed here).



Technical Linking: Link MRSS GUID codes to WordPress posts and ensure Lead Images/Thumbnails are correctly uploaded. 



MRSS Management: Upload videos to S3/MRSS feeds, manage metadata, and apply a strict 10-tag rule (3 Broad, 4 Niche, 3 Trending tags).



Tracking: Log all completed work in the Yahoo Article Tracking sheet.



Required Skills & Experience

WordPress Expert: You must be comfortable with the WordPress Gutenberg/Classic editor and managing sidebar metadata (Categories, Tags, Authors).



AI Savvy: Experience using Gemini or ChatGPT to generate and refine content.



Technical Accuracy: Ability to follow complex SOPs without skipping steps. You understand the importance of GUIDs and S3 naming conventions.



Speed & Efficiency: Ability to hit a daily target of 30 articles while maintaining high quality.



File Management: Proficiency in Google Drive organization and file naming protocols.



Technical Requirements

Stable, high-speed internet connection (Back-up internet is a plus).



Laptop/Desktop capable of handling video downloads and multiple browser tabs.



Experience with S3 or MRSS feeds is a significant advantage.

title: TikTok Livestream Expert (Back-end Ops)

 Marketing: Manage the

3. Student Experience & Community

s and portal access.

, Slack, or Circle) to encourage engagement and answer non-technical questions.

Required Skills & Qualifications

s and landing pages.

   *
: ActiveCampaign, ConvertKit, or Mailchimp.

   * Automation: Basic knowledge of Zapier to connect different tools.

 * Analytical Mindset: Comfortable looking at Google Analytics or Meta Ads Manager to see what is (and isn't) working.

 * Self-Starter: Ability to work independently in a remote environment and meet strict launch deadlines.

Success Metrics (KPIs)

 * Revenue Growth: Meeting or exceeding monthly sales targets.

 * Cost Per Lead (CPL): Maintaining efficient marketing spend.

 * Student Retention: Minimizing refund requests and maximizing course completion rates.

 * Engagement Rate: Level of activity within the student community.

title: Carrier Sourcing Specialist
description:
Carrier Sourcing Specialist  - Ally Logistics



ABOUT ALLY LOGISTICS:

Ally Logistics is a U.S.-based third-party logistics (3PL) company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Since 2012, we’ve been committed to creating the ultimate freight shipping experience by operating at the optimal intersection of people and technology.



As a full-service 3PL, we specialize in a wide range of freight solutions, including dry van, refrigerated, drayage, straight truck, open deck/flatbed, drop-trailer programs, warehousing, and more. Our diverse service capabilities allow us to support shippers across industries with flexible, reliable, and scalable logistics strategies.

We partner with skilled global talent to support our continued growth and operational excellence, ensuring our customers receive efficient, high-quality service at every step of the supply chain.



ROLE SUMMARY:

The Carrier Sourcing Specialist is responsible for ensuring timely and reliable coverage of customer freight by executing same-day or next-day load sourcing with accuracy and urgency. Key responsibilities include coverage on same and next-day loads, dispatching carriers, performing thorough track-and-trace, extracting and relaying critical customer updates, and sourcing capacity for specific lanes. Success in this position requires exceptional multitasking, attention to detail, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, high-volume logistics environment.



Regular Weekly Schedule (40 hours): Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time with 1-hour unpaid lunch break from 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM Eastern. Overtime (40+ hours in a week) requires manager approval.



JOB DUTIES/RESPONSIBILITIES: 

Under the direction of management, the following outlines the core responsibilities for this position. Duties may evolve based on business needs.



-Manage same-day and next-day freight coverage, including dry van, refrigerated, and other equipment types

-Dispatch drivers and perform proactive track-and-trace forloads booked by you

-Extract and communicate critical customer updates to customer teams

-Effectively manage a high-volume workload - 100+ inbound quotes a day

-Ensure all compliance measures are taken when vetting carrier MCs numbers. Adhering to Ally Logistics compliance standards.

-Work closely with the outbound carrier sales team to line up any consistent options for carriers on specific lanes. 



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs):

-Successfully working with carriers and booking at least 10  loads a day

-Completing and answering 60 inbound calls a day  

-Additional KPIs may be added or adjusted at management’s discretion



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:

-Minimum of 2 years of experience in logistics/3PL industry

-Minimum of 4 years of experience in the customer service industry

-Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

-Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.



Access to:

-A reliable computer with  high-speed internet

-Backup internet source (mobile hotspot or secondary line preferred)

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Headset

-Professional remote workspace

-Ability to work U.S. business hours (EST)



Experience with:

-Outlook

-Zoom phone

-Slack

-Basic CRM or logistics platform



Additional Requirements

1. Technology & Equipment Requirements

-Reliable high-speed internet and computer

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Quiet, professional workspace



2. Availability Requirements

-Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time

-Must provide advanced notice for planned time off

-Must maintain consistent communication (Slack responsiveness,
, etc.)

Availability to work full-time on EST (New York time).

Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact effectively with candidates and internal stakeholders.

Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple roles and priorities simultaneously.

Compensation in USD

Full-time position with 40 hours weekly

Supportive work environment with opportunities for growth and professional developmentJob Summary:



We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Remote Millwork Estimator to support accurate pricing and evaluation of cabinetry, furniture, and architectural millwork projects. This role is responsible for reviewing architectural drawings and specifications, preparing detailed cost estimates for materials, labor, and subcontractor services, and coordinating with external suppliers to obtain accurate pricing. The Millwork Estimator will maintain current knowledge of industry standards, material costs, and labor rates, while identifying assumptions, exclusions, and potential risks within estimates. The ideal candidate brings strong technical expertise in millwork estimating, proficiency with CAD and estimating software, excellent communication and analytical skills, and a clear focus on estimating responsibilities without project management involvement.



Key Responsibilities:



Prepare accurate cost estimates for millwork projects, including materials, labor, and subcontractor expenses.

Review architectural drawings, blueprints, and specifications to define project scope and requirements.

Coordinate with external suppliers for materials such as upholstery, metal, and glass.

Maintain up-to-date knowledge of material pricing, labor rates, and relevant industry standards.

Deliver clear, accurate, and professional estimates to internal teams and clients.

Identify assumptions, exclusions, and potential risks within estimates to support accurate pricing.

Update and maintain estimating databases, templates, and cost libraries for future projects.

Support additional administrative related tasks as assigned.

Qualifications & Requirements:



Strong English communication skills (written and spoken).

Excellent interpersonal and collaboration skills.

Proficiency with CAD software and estimating tools.

Ability to read and interpret architectural drawings, blueprints, and project specifications accurately.

Proven experience as a millwork estimator (cabinetry, furniture, architectural millwork).

Strong knowledge of millwork materials, manufacturing processes, and supplier pricing.

Experience coordinating with suppliers for materials such as upholstery, metal, and glass.

Excellent organizational, communication, and analytical skills.

This role is focused exclusively on estimating responsibilities; no project management duties are included.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets), preferred.

Sound judgment and ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Reliable computer (Windows 10 or newer), two monitors, and stable high-speed internet.?

Compensation & Benefits:



100% remote work.

Compensation in USD.

Full-time position with 40 hours weekly.

Great work environment with potential for growth.

title: Real Estate Admin VA - Dashboard Manager & Data Entry
description:
We are a busy real estate team looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage our lead dashboards and handle data entry. This is strictly an administrative role; there is absolutely no calling involved!



Your main objective is to ensure our dashboards across 8 different lead sources remain updated and never fall into a delinquent status. By keeping our lead updates accurate and timely, you will directly help our team maintain a high ranking with our lead sources, allowing our agents to receive more leads.



How the Workflow Operates:



When an agent accepts a lead, it automatically assigns it to them in our CRM, Follow Up Boss (FUB).



The agent communicates with the lead and updates their notes/status inside FUB.



Your Job: You will monitor our 8 lead source dashboards. When a dashboard requires an update, you will search for that lead's name in Follow Up Boss, find the agent's recent update, and transfer that information back into the lead source dashboard.



Key Responsibilities:



Monitor and maintain approximately 8 different lead generation dashboards.



Cross-reference lead profiles between the dashboards and Follow Up Boss.



Accurately copy and paste agent updates from Follow Up Boss into the required lead dashboards to ensure compliance and prevent delinquency.



Generate weekly reports tracking agent statuses for the Team Lead.



Generate a comprehensive monthly report for the Team Lead ahead of our monthly meetings.



Requirements:



Excellent attention to detail and high accuracy in data entry.



Familiarity with Follow Up Boss (FUB) is highly preferred.



Ability to follow a routine and check dashboards consistently.



Reliable internet connection and computer setup.

description:
About the Role

Edge Services is a growing window cleaning company in Minnesota building a premium local brand. We're looking for one reliable, creative person to own our social media content — not churn out filler, but create content that actually stops the scroll and wins local attention.

This is a focused role with clear expectations and real content to work with.



What You'll Do



Design clean, modern graphics in Canva (Instagram,
, Google Business)

Write captions with strong hooks and clear calls-to-action

Build 3–5 posts per week following a content calendar

Turn photos/videos we provide into polished before/after and promo posts

Use AI tools to work efficiently — then refine everything to match brand standards

Repurpose content across formats (feed posts, stories, ads)





What We're Looking For



Strong Canva skills — clean and modern, not cluttered

Natural, confident English writing

You understand what makes content perform (hooks, timing, format)

You use AI tools well but know when output needs a human touch

Consistent and deadline-reliable



Bonus (not required):

Video editing (Reels),
 Ads experience, home services industry background



Our Brand Style

Premium. Local. Slightly bold.

Think: "Spring is here — your windows shouldn't look like winter" or "St. Cloud homeowners, this is your sign."

High-end service feel. Not discount-brand energy.



Compensation



Monthly retainer or per-post rate — based on your experience and output

Performance bonuses available

Long-term role with room to grow



(Please include your rate expectations when applying.)



How to Apply

To be considered, please send:



Portfolio or social pages you've managed

2–3 Canva graphics you've designed

A brief note on how you'd approach content for a local service business

(Bonus) One sample post idea for a window cleaning company



Applications without work samples will not be reviewed.

title: Commercial Trucking Insurance Agent
description:
Commercial Trucking Insurance Agent

Remote

Full-Time | Commission-Based | Bilingual Preferred



Join Non Stop Insurance Brokerage — Where the Road to Success Never Ends



Are you looking for a rewarding career in a high-demand industry? Non Stop Insurance Brokerage is expanding and actively seeking a driven, knowledgeable, and customer-focused Commercial Trucking Insurance Agent to help protect the businesses that keep America moving.



About Us:

At Non Stop Insurance Brokerage, we specialize in providing tailored insurance solutions for the trucking and logistics industry. From new authorities to experienced fleet owners, we understand the unique needs of our clients and pride ourselves on being fast, reliable, and fully FMCSA-compliant.



What You’ll Do:



Generate, qualify, and close leads within the trucking and commercial auto sector

Provide insurance quotes, bind policies, and complete filings such as BMC-91X

Educate clients on coverage options (liability, cargo, physical damage, bobtail, etc.)

Manage renewals, policy changes, and ongoing client support

Maintain strong relationships with carriers and underwriters

Stay up-to-date on DOT/FMSCA regulations and industry changes

Qualifications:



Active Property & Casualty Insurance License (Required)

1+ year experience in commercial trucking or commercial auto insurance

Excellent communication, sales, and customer service skills

Highly organized, self-driven, and tech-savvy

Bilingual (English/Spanish) highly preferred

Familiarity with FMCSA and DOT compliance a plus



Why Work With Us?

- High Commission + Bonus Opportunities

- Flexible Work Setup (Remote)

- Access to Top-Tier Insurance Markets

- Ongoing Training & Mentorship

- Room to Grow in a Fast-Paced, Niche Industry



Ready to Join the Movement?

Send your resume and a short introduction to messaging on onlinejobs.ph

Subject Line: Commercial Agent – Non Stop Insurance



At Non Stop Insurance Brokerage, we don't just sell policies—we START where they stop..

title: Marketing & Administrative Virtual  Assistant

This role focuses on executing marketing tasks, organizing content, managing listings, 

and assisting with administrative workflows. 

This position does NOT involve marketing strategy or creative direction. All direction and

The ideal candidate is organized, reliable, tech-savvy, and comfortable managing multiple 

small tasks throughout the day.

s into folders

mber
