title: Full Stack AI Enegineer for Sass AI platform
description:
Job Title



Senior Full-Stack & AI Engineer 



Location



Remote 







About 10XCoach.ai



10XCoach.ai is a subscription-based AI business-coaching platform designed to help entrepreneurs and executives improve performance across the 8 Pillars of a Healthy Business, as outlined in The Small Business BIG EXIT. The platform delivers always-on, human-like AI coaching through specialized AI agents that analyze business data, conduct coaching conversations, generate action plans, and track progress over time. 



10XCoach.ai - SaaS Project Blue…



.



We have built a scalable, multi-agent SaaS platform that blends structured business frameworks with advanced AI, analytics, and personalization.



Role Overview



We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack & AI Engineer to play a critical role in the design, development, scaling, and maintenance of the 10XCoach.ai platform. This role is responsible for front-end and back-end development, as well as integrating AI coaching agents into a production-ready SaaS system.



This is a hands-on, high-impact position for an engineer who enjoys building complex systems from the ground up and shaping the technical foundation of an AI-first product.



Key Responsibilities

Full-Stack Platform Development



Design, build, and maintain the front-end user experience, including dashboards, AI chat interfaces, assessments, and reporting views



Develop scalable back-end APIs and services to support users, subscriptions, AI interactions, analytics, and progress tracking



Implement secure authentication, authorization, and role-based access



AI & Agent Integration



Integrate large language models into a multi-agent coaching system



Implement contextual memory, prompt orchestration, and business logic for AI coaches



Ensure AI agents can access quiz data, historical sessions, and user performance metrics to deliver personalized coaching experiences



SaaS Infrastructure & Architecture



Architect cloud-native systems that support scalability, reliability, and security



Integrate payment processing, subscription tiers, and usage tracking



Design and manage databases for user profiles, assessments, chat history, KPIs, and analytics



Data, Analytics & Automation



Build pipelines to capture and analyze user engagement and performance data



Support automated
 summaries, follow-ups, and progress reminders



Enable reporting features such as business health scores, growth indices, and quarterly insights



Collaboration & Product Development



Work closely with founders, product, and business stakeholders



Translate coaching frameworks and product requirements into technical solutions



Contribute to MVP definition, development roadmap, and long-term platform evolution



Required Qualifications



5+ years of experience in full-stack software development



Proven experience building SaaS platforms end to end



Strong front-end development skills (React, Next.js, or similar)



Strong back-end development experience (Node.js, Python, FastAPI, or similar)



Hands-on experience integrating AI/LLM-based systems into applications



Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Vercel, or similar)



Solid understanding of databases, APIs, authentication, and security best practices



Preferred / Bonus Experience



Experience with AI agents, conversational systems, or coaching platforms



Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, or retrieval-augmented generation



Experience with subscription billing platforms (Stripe, Chargebee)



Startup or early-stage product experience



Exposure to business intelligence, coaching, or education platforms



Why This Role Matters



This role is foundational to the success of 10XCoach.ai. You will help bring to life an AI-driven coaching ecosystem that directly impacts how entrepreneurs and executives improve, scale, and ultimately exit their businesses. Your work will define the platform’s technical backbone and enable future growth, integrations, and innovation.



What We Offer



Opportunity to be a core technical contributor to an AI-first SaaS platform



High ownership and influence over architecture and technical decisions



Competitive compensation with potential equity participation



Fully remote, flexible work environment



How to Apply



Submit your resume, portfolio, or GitHub profile along with a brief note explaining your background and interest in building AI-powered SaaS platforms and why 10XCoach.ai resonates with you to my
 address at

title: Sales Assistant
description:
About us: 

EMRG is an award-winning Digital Marketing Agency based in Los Angeles. With a team of experienced professionals for each service line, we offer a wide range of digital marketing solutions that are customized to meet the unique needs of each client. We are renowned for our outstanding customer service and ability to deliver exceptional `results. As a leading agency in the industry, we have established ourselves as a reliable partner for businesses looking to grow and expand their online presence.

As our company continues to grow, we are also committed to expanding our philanthropic goals and supporting children in need worldwide.



Job Title: Remote Sales Assistant - Digital Marketing



Job Description:

As a Remote Sales Assistant in the digital marketing industry, you will play a vital role in supporting the sales team and ensuring the smooth operation of the digital marketing sales process. Your primary responsibility will be to assist with various sales tasks, including lead generation, client communication, and sales administration. Working remotely, you will collaborate closely with the sales team and other stakeholders to drive sales growth and meet revenue targets.



Responsibilities:

Lead Generation:  Conduct research and identify potential clients through various online platforms: social media channels, Linked IN, Sales Navigator, and industry databases. Initiating Outbound outreach (outbound calls and sending outbound
). Collect and organize relevant information, such as contact details and company profiles, for further outreach.



Client Communication: Communicate with prospective clients via
, phone, or online messaging platforms. Introduce the company's digital marketing services, answer inquiries, and schedule appointments or product demonstrations.



Sales Support: Assist the sales team in preparing sales presentations, proposals, and contracts. Coordinate with internal teams, such as marketing and creative departments, to gather necessary materials and ensure timely delivery to clients.



CRM Management: Utilize customer relationship management (CRM) software to maintain accurate and up-to-date client records, track sales activities, and generate reports. Monitor and update the sales pipeline to reflect the progress of leads and opportunities.



Relationship Building: Foster positive and long-lasting relationships with clients, acting as a reliable point of contact. Provide exceptional customer service, address concerns, and identify opportunities to upsell or cross-sell additional digital marketing services.



Market Research: Stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging digital marketing strategies. Share relevant insights with the sales team to refine sales approaches and stay ahead in the competitive market.



Sales Administration: Perform administrative tasks, such as data entry, document management, and sales performance tracking. Assist with the organization and coordination of sales events, trade shows, and webinars.



Requirements:

Proven experience as a sales assistant or in a similar sales support role.

Legal Marketing Experience is a plus

Able to quickly capture and summarize notes

Highly organized, Can manage tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups efficiently.

Understands client needs and project scope with ease.

Fluent, with a neutral accent preferred (but not required) for clear communication

Experience in digital marketing concepts and practices.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.

Proficiency in using CRM software and other sales-related tools.

Self-motivated and able to work effectively in a remote work environment.

Attention to detail and ability to maintain accurate records.

Knowledge of market research techniques is a plus.



Join our dynamic digital marketing team as a Remote Sales Assistant and contribute to our mission of helping businesses achieve their marketing goals through innovative digital strategies.

title: Remote Architectural Designer
description:
Remote Architectural Designer (Contract) – Residential (DADUs + ADUs, USA Projects)



Location: Remote (International candidates welcome)

Job Type: Contract / Ongoing Freelance

Time Zone: Some overlap with Pacific Time (USA) preferred



About the Role

  We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented architectural designer/drafter to support residential projects based in Washington State (USA).



  The majority of work will focus on Detached Accessory Dwelling Units (DADUs/ADUs), along with occasional single-family homes, remodels, and additions.



 This is a great opportunity for someone looking for consistent remote work with a clear scope and repeatable project types.



Scope of Work

  Draft and develop permit-ready drawing sets

  Convert sketches/redlines into clean Archicad models and plans

  Assist with revisions and permit corrections

  Apply redlines and markups efficiently

  Organize files and maintain consistent drawing standards

  Primarily edit and on occasion produce:

  Floor plans

  Elevations

  Sections

  Basic construction details



Required Skills

  Strong proficiency in Archicad

  Experience producing construction drawings for residential projects

  Ability to follow U.S.-style drawing sets and standards

  Strong attention to detail and accuracy

  Good written and verbal communication in English



Preferred Skills

  Degree or formal training in Architecture, Architectural Technology, or related field

  Experience with U.S. building codes or permitting processes

  Familiarity with ADUs/DADUs

  Experience with Buildertrend or similar tools

  Ability to do basic site plans with zoning interpretation

  Strong organizational skills with ability to implement system processes



How We Work

  You will receive clear markups, sketches, or example sets

  Work is typically repeatable and system-based

  Communication via messaging + occasional video calls

  Looking for someone who is:

   Reliable

   Communicative & responsive

   Able to turn around revisions quickly without compromising attention to detail



To Apply

  Please include:

   Portfolio (residential work preferred)

   Examples of construction drawings you’ve produced

   Your experience with Archicad and Buildertrend

   Your hourly rate

   Your availability (# of hours per week + schedule availability w/ time zone)

   If you have worked on U.S.-based projects before, please briefly describe your experience



Important Notes

  This is a production-focused role (not high-level design leadership)

  You do not need to be licensed

  Training on local requirements will be provided, but you must be able to learn and adapt quickly

· Candidates may be asked to complete a short task test (2-4 hours) to demonstrate drafting ability, understanding of         permitting and building/zoning codes,  and attention to detail.

title: 3D Blender Artist & Motion Graphics Specialist
description:
First Direct is looking for a 3D Blender Artist & Motion Graphics Specialist



Please Watch First : 
/share/0c476ff7d306424b86180dfc
Apply Here : 
/jobs/Careersph



As our 3D Blender Artist, you will serve as the creative engine behind all 3D visual storytelling for First Direct and FirstDirect360. You will build high-impact 3D animations, product visualizations, motion graphics, and virtual environments that help communicate complex marketing concepts in a visually powerful way.



This is not just modeling random objects. You will help visualize data, marketing systems, omni-channel flows, booth concepts, product demos, explainer visuals, and branded creative assets that support digital campaigns and live presentations.



You should have expert-level knowledge of Blender and strong motion design instincts. You must understand lighting, composition, animation timing, and rendering workflows. The ideal candidate can take a marketing idea and transform it into visually compelling 3D content that drives engagement and results.



ABOUT THE COMPANY



First Direct is a fast-growing marketing agency in Bellevue, Nebraska, USA. We transform businesses with the right information, insights, and solutions to empower their growth and success. Our vision is to create remarkable impact in the growth and success of over 100,000 businesses.



We invest in our employees’ personal growth with daily training and development. Cardone University Online Training helps tea
mbers reach their personal, professional, and financial goals.



We operate with six core values: Discipline, Inspirational, Accountability, Transparency, Alignment, and Results.



REQUIREMENTS



Stable high-speed internet connection



Ability to work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (9:00 PM – 6:00 AM PH Time)



Dedicated workspace suitable for creative production



PERFORMANCE OBJECTIVES



Create 3D animations, models, and motion graphics using Blender



Develop visual assets for digital ads, landing pages, social media, and video content



Build virtual environments and animated explainers for marketing presentations



Support creative campaigns with cinematic-quality rendering



Collaborate closely with Marketing Manager and Video Editor on concept execution



Optimize 3D assets for performance across web and social platforms



Organize and maintain 3D asset libraries and project files



Render, export, and deliver final files in correct formats for distribution



Assist in virtual studio and animated scene production



KEY COMPETENCIES



Advanced proficiency in Blender (modeling, animation, lighting, rendering, compositing)



Strong understanding of motion graphics and storytelling principles



Experience with Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro



Knowledge of rendering engines (Cycles, Eevee)



Understanding of textures, materials, camera movement, and visual realism



Ability to work efficiently under deadlines



Strong attention to detail and organized file management



Self-motivated, proactive, and solution-oriented



Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate with a remote team



BENEFITS



13th Month Pay



Key Performance Bonus (after 90 days of employment)



Forex Fees Covered

title: REAL ESTATE PHOTOGRAPHY VIRTUAL ASSISTANT
description:
About us



PY Productions is a London-based luxury real estate photography and videography company. We serve high-end properties across Mayfair, Chelsea, and Knightsbridge, and pride ourselves on cinematic, lifestyle-driven visuals that help agents and developers sell premium homes. We're growing fast — and we need a VA who can grow with us, not just keep up with us.



What this role actually is



This is not a purely administrative role. Yes, there is daily admin — but we're equally looking for someone with a creative brain who understands Instagram, personal branding, and what it takes to build an audience from zero. hat's an exciting opportunity — but it requires genuine skill and initiative.



Your three core responsibilities 



1: Instagram growth & content strategy

Help plan, schedule, and execute content for our new business Instagram page. Think Reels, captions, content calendars, and hashtag strategy — all aligned with a luxury, high-end aesthetic. You should understand what makes an account grow organically and be able to bring ideas to the table, not just execute instructions.



2: Client outreach & acquisition

Use our established Instagram outreach method to send targeted, personalised messages to potential clients each day. Track conversations, follow up where needed, and help us fill the calendar with new shoots. A feel for professional, luxury-market communication is essential here.



3: Daily admin & quality control

Review and deliver edited photos each morning, manage retouch requests from clients, and handle
s and communications throughout the day. Accuracy, attention to detail, and responsiveness are non-negotiable here.





What we're looking for

Proven experience growing an Instagram account (business or personal)

Understanding of Reels, content calendars, and Instagram's algorithm

Strong written English — professional and on-brand in every message

Available and responsive during UK business hours (GMT/BST)

High attention to detail for QC and client delivery

Proactive — brings ideas, flags problems, doesn't wait to be told everything

Comfortable with a luxury brand aesthetic (no generic content)

Reliable internet connection (speed test required with application)

Previous experience working with Real Estate Photography Company preferred. 



What you'll love about this role

You'll have real creative input — this isn't just ticking boxes. As we grow, so does your role. We're a small, ambitious team that moves fast, communicates clearly, and actually values good work. If you're someone who takes ownership and thinks beyond the brief, you'll thrive here.



How to apply: 

1 Send your CV/resume 

2 Include a link to an Instagram account you've helped grow (or your own) — this is required, not optional

3 Attach a screenshot of your internet speed test

4 Record a short video (60–90 seconds) introducing yourself to PY Productions — tell us one Instagram account you admire and why

title: Life Insurance Appointment Setter (US-Based | Graveyard Shift) /
description:
Job Title: Life Insurance Appointment Setter (US-Based | Graveyard Shift)

Job Type: Full-Time, Remote

Schedule:

US Hours: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM (Monday through Friday)Occasionally SaturdaysPhilippine Time: Graveyard shift



Company Overview

We are an American-based life insurance company looking for a motivated and reliable Appointment Setter. This role is strictly focused on booking appointments for clients to speak with a licensed life insurance specialist.

You will NOT be selling insurance.

Your only responsibility is to qualify prospects and schedule appointments.



Responsibilities

Make outbound calls using a dialerSpeak with prospects and ask required qualifying questionsBook appointments for life insurance specialistsAccurately log notes and appointment detailsFollow scripts and proceduresMeet daily call and appointment goalsMaintain professionalism on every call



Requirements

Excellent English communication skills

Comfortable working graveyard shift (PH time)Experience in appointment setting, telemarketing, or call center work preferredReliable internet connection and quiet workspaceDriven, accountable, and self-motivatedComfortable using a dialer and CRMAble to follow instructions and scripts consistently



Compensation

Base Salary: USD $400 per monthCommission: Paid on appointments that convert to a salePayments: Made via Wise



Why Work With Us

Long-term opportunity with a US-based companySimple role: appointment setting only (no closing)Clear expectations and structured workflowOpportunity to earn commissionProfessional management and stable schedule

Resume

Confirmation that you can work graveyard hours (PH time)Only serious applicants should apply.



--------------------------------

US Hours: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM (Lunes hanggang Biyernes)May paminsang SabadoOras sa Pilipinas: Graveyard shift



Paglalarawan ng Kumpanya

Kami ay isang American-based life insurance company na naghahanap ng masipag, responsable, at maaasahang Appointment Setter. Ang tungkulin mo ay mag-set ng appointments lamang para makausap ng kliyente ang isang lisensyadong life insurance specialist.

Hindi ka magbebenta ng insurance.

Ang trabaho mo ay mag-qualify ng prospects at mag-book ng appointments.



Mga Responsibilidad

Tumawag sa mga prospects gamit ang auto dialerMakipag-usap sa mga prospects at magtanong ng mga kailangang qualifying questionsMag-set ng appointments para sa life insurance specialistMaglagay ng tamang notes at detalye ng appointmentsSumunod sa scripts at prosesoMatupad ang daily call at appointment targetsPanatilihin ang propesyonal na pakikipag-usap sa bawat tawag



Mga Kwalipikasyon

Magaling magsalita ng Ingles (clear at professional)

Kayang magtrabaho ng graveyard shift (PH time)May experience sa appointment setting, telemarketing, o call center (preferred)May stable na internet at tahimik na workspaceMasipag, responsable, at may self-disciplineKomportable gumamit ng dialer at CRMMarunong sumunod sa instructions at scripts



Kompensasyon

Base Salary: USD $400 kada buwanKomisyon: May dagdag na bayad kapag ang appointment ay nag-convert sa saleParaan ng Bayad: Ipapadala sa pamamagitan ng Wise



Bakit Ka Sasali sa Amin

Long-term at stable na trabaho sa isang US-based companyMadaling role: appointment setting lamang (walang closing)Malinaw na expectations at structured na sistemaMay pagkakataong kumita ng komisyonPropesyonal at maayos na management



Paano Mag-Apply

Isumite ang sumusunod:

Resume

Maikling paliwanag ng iyong experience sa call center o appointment setting

Kumpirmasyon na kaya mong magtrabaho ng graveyard shift (PH time)Serious applicants lamang ang inaanyayahang mag-apply.

title: Accounting Supervisor
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW:

SimpleKeep is a modern US-based accounting company that values our team and creates a fun, dynamic work environment. Our goal is to provide exceptional accounting services to our clients while fostering a positive and supportive team culture. We are a remote team that leverages the latest technology to work together efficiently and effectively.



We're a great company to work for, and a small team, so you'll be able to come in and really have an impact on the way we do business. We're growing, and we’re looking to add an experienced person to our team.



POSITION OVERVIEW:

We’re seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Accounting Supervisor with proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero to join our growing remote team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in accounting, a passion for mentoring and developing staff, and a desire to work in a dynamic and supportive team environment. This is a remote position with flexible work hours.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Supervision and Leadership:

- Manage and oversee daily accounting operations, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger.

- Mentor and provide guidance to junior accountants and other tea
mbers.

- Conduct performance evaluations and provide feedback to staff.

- Develop and maintain accounting policies and procedures.

2. Financial Reporting:

- Oversee the preparation and analysis of financial statements.

- Ensure timely and accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.

- Provide financial analysis and insights to clients.

3. Bookkeeping and Reconciliation

- Ensure accurate and timely recording of financial transactions.

- Oversee bank reconciliations, accounts payable, and accounts receivable processes.

- Ensure accurate and timely month-end and year-end close processes.

- Prepare financial statements and other financial reports.

4. Budgeting and Forecasting:

- Lead the preparation of budgets and financial forecasts.

- Monitor budget performance and report variances.

5. Tax Compliance:

- Supervise the preparation and filing of tax returns.

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local tax regulations.

6. Software Utilization:

- Oversee the use of QuickBooks and Xero for all accounting functions.

- Ensure data integrity and accuracy within these systems.

7. Audit and Compliance:

- Ensure compliance with internal financial and accounting policies and procedures.

- Coordinate and support internal and external audits.

8. Communication:

- Communicate effectively with clients, vendors, and financial institutions.

- Provide clear and concise reports and updates to senior management.

- Ensure excellent English communication within the team and with stakeholders.

- Provide exceptional customer service to clients.

- Collaborate with other departments to streamline processes and improve efficiency.



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

- CPA certification preferred.

- Minimum of 5 years of accounting experience, with at least 2 years in a supervisory role.

- Proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero is mandatory.

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting.

- Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

- Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

- Experience in managing remote teams and working with US clients.

- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other accounting software.

- Efficient, personable, adaptable, and organized.



WORK ENVIRONMENT:

This is a remote position; candidates must have a reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace.



BENEFITS:

- Competitive salary and benefits package.

- Flexible work hours and remote work environment.

- Opportunities for growth and advancement.

- A supportive team culture that values work-life balance and employee satisfaction.

- Health card benefit after 9 months of employment.



WORKING SCHEDULE: Tuesday-Saturday 3am-12nn Manila Time



APPLICATION INSTRUCTION:

After you're done reading through the post, if you're ready to apply for the position, please send an
 to 
 sending your
, please be sure to:

- Attach your resume.

- Include a summary of your experience.

BENEFITS:

- Flexible work hours and remote work environment.

title: Video Editor needed for regular, ongoing work
description:
THE COMPANY

Avalon Creative Group is a dynamic and innovative company headquartered in the heart of the San Francisco Bay Area and Silicon Valley in California. We specialize in the creation of captivating and immersive content for corporate clients, offering comprehensive content design, production, and creative services. Working with Avalon Creative Group presents an exciting opportunity for individuals seeking to collaborate with renowned brands, while also offering a continuous learning environment that fosters personal and professional growth.



JOB DESCRIPTION

Avalon Creative Group is seeking a talented and experienced video editor and 3D animator based in the Philippines to work with us as an independent contractor. Our work includes videos to inspire audiences at corporate events, on-demand marketing webinars, internal corporate training and sales enablement, product demos, highlight reels, social media ads, interviews, customer testimonials and more.



Our goal is to establish a long term working relationship with a creative, reliable and ambitious video professional. After successfully completing an initial trial period, the right person will become an integral member of our creative team on a full-time contract basis.



RESPONSIBILITIES

> Edit high quality videos from a variety of sources, including single-camera, multi-camera, stock footage, AI generated video, graphic elements, music, sound effects, etc.

> Effectively and efficiently generate video footage and elements using the latest AI tools

> Manage accuracy and correction of color and audio

> Understand and apply corporate branding and style guidelines and templates (MOGRTs)

> Manage, organize and backup video assets and deliverables, including raw footage, graphics, sound files, stock footage, projects, files, etc.

> Adhere to budgeted time constraints while incorporating client feedback and changes through multiple rounds of review and revisions

> Contribute to and consistently apply efficient workflow processes and standards (SOPs)

> Document guidelines and process details for tea
mbers and clients

> Pursue ongoing professional development and skill enhancements



REQUIRED SKILLS

> Having a proven track record of punctuality, reliability and professionalism is essential

> Excellent attention to detail and adeptness at managing multiple concurrent projects is required

> Strong communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a remote team environment

> English fluency (written and spoken) along with excellent communication skills are essential

> You must be based in the Philippines with fast, reliable internet access and a robust computer

> You must have a quiet workspace where you can work without distractions and join Zoom calls



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

> At least 2 years of professional experience and proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite, specifically Premiere Pro and After Effects

> Bonus if you have experience or proficiency with using 3D software like Blender, Cinema4D, or anything similar.

> You must have strong creative skills and a portfolio of work that demonstrates your passion and experience with video editing and motion graphics

>> Your portfolio must include examples of the type of work listed in the job description section

> Expertise in video editing fundamentals and techniques, including pacing, storytelling, and continuity

> Knowledge of different video formats and codecs for various delivery platforms



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

> 5 years of experience with Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects.

> At least 2 years of experience and proficiency with Blender or Cinema 4D.

> Proficiency in color correction, audio editing, and mastering

> Familiarity with team communication and project management tools like Smartsheet, Slack, ClickUp, or similar platforms

> Familiarity or experience using AI post-production tools

> Strong understanding of visual composition, typography, and graphic design principles

> Completion of training and/or certifications in key software used

> Knowledge of social media platforms and video encoding specifications for each platform



COMPENSATION & ENGAGEMENT

> Compensation rate for full-time, independent contractor will be $1000 - $1300 USD per month

> Ten paid holidays and ten days of accrued paid time off (PTO) will be included annually

> Rate will be based on qualifications and experience

> This is a remote work position

> Work hours will need to overlap with standard business hours in California (9:00-6:00pm PT)



HOW TO APPLY

If you are interested in working with us as an independent contractor and you meet the required qualifications listed above, please APPLY HERE -

title: Full-Stack Laravel + Webflow Developer (E-Commerce & Design Sites)
description:
About the Role

EuroHome Interiors is a modern European furniture and interior design brand serving U.S. clients. Our stack includes:

- A live Laravel e-commerce furniture site (with images stored on AWS S3)

- A Webflow-based design/marketing site we are building and expanding



We need a full-stack developer who is strong in both Laravel and Webflow – capable of front-end and back-end work, and comfortable owning integrations, logic, and UI. We are not looking for 'willing to learn.' We want someone with real, live Webflow and Laravel experience.

Key Responsibilities

- Review, clean up, and improve our existing Laravel e-commerce site (structure, performance, security).

- Develop new back-end features: product variations, pricing logic, APIs, and integrations.

- Implement data-driven and conditional behavior on the front end (Blade, JS, etc.).

- Work with AWS/S3 for product image storage and delivery.

- Build and maintain our design website in Webflow (layouts, CMS, custom code embeds, interactions, responsive behavior).

- Ensure consistent UX and branding between Webflow and our Laravel site.

- Use Git and follow modern development best practices.

Must-Have Requirements

- 2+ years hands-on experience with PHP + Laravel in production (not just school or tutorials).

- Proven Webflow experience – at least 2 live sites you built or heavily developed (front end, CMS, basic logic/integrations).

- Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, REST APIs, and MySQL.

- Experience with Git (GitHub / GitLab).

- Good English communication.

- Comfortable working full-time on U.S. Eastern Time (graveyard).

Nice to Have

- Experience with AWS, especially S3 (image storage and delivery).

- E-commerce / product configurator experience.

How to Apply

Please send a message with:



1) Your answers

- One Laravel project: What did it do, what was your role, and what was the hardest technical problem you solved?

- One Webflow project: What did you build (front end + CMS/integrations), and what are you most proud of?

- Do you have experience working on U.S. Eastern Time? Can you do this long term?



2) Your links

- 2–4 live Webflow sites you built or heavily worked on (explain your role on each).

- Any live Laravel projects (if available).

- Your GitHub/GitLab or a Laravel code sample that reflects your usual style.



Subject line:

EuroHome Full-Stack Laravel + Webflow Developer – [Your Full Name]



Send the
 to 



We’re looking for someone who wants long-term ownership of our Laravel platform, Webflow site, and AWS-based image stack—not just short-term task work.

Identifying recurring issues (product, shipping, sizing, etc.)

Proactively suggesting improvements to reduce complaints

Working with our team to optimize support flows and SOPs



We are currently doing high monthly volume, so this role requires speed, consistency, and experience.



We are NOT looking to train a team.

We need a team that can take over immediately and perform.



What We’re Looking For



We are specifically looking for:



A team (not just 1 person)

Proven experience in e-commerce / dropshipping customer support

Experience handling high ticket volume daily

Strong experience with dispute management and chargebacks

Ability to follow SOPs but also think independently

Fast response times and clear communication in English





Compensation:

We offer a fixed hourly rate + performance-based bonuses.



Bonuses are based on:



Reducing refunds

Handling disputes successfully

Improving customer satisfaction



Top-performing teams will be rewarded long-term.



Requirements:

Proven experience with Shopify-based customer support

Experience with tools like Gorgias, Zendesk, Freshdesk, or similar

Strong understanding of returns, refunds, and dispute handling

Ability to handle angry customers and de-escalate situations

Excellent written English

Ability to work daily and consistently

Big Plus

Experience with dropshipping stores

Experience managing support teams internally

Experience optimizing SOPs and workflows

Experience with refund prevention strategies

Do NOT Apply If:

You are a beginner or have no e-commerce experience

You have never handled disputes or chargebacks

You only have basic VA experience

You are applying as an individual without team support

To Apply



Send a message with:



Introduction of your team (size, structure, roles)

Your experience with e-commerce / dropshipping support

Examples of stores or brands you have worked with

Tools you use (Gorgias, Zendesk, etc.)

Your hourly/monthly pricing



Important: Include the word “SUPPORT” in your application so we know you read everything.



No experience = no response.

title: Long Form Video Editor
description:
**Job Title:** Long-Form Video Editor (YouTube – Formula 1 Content)



**Location:** Remote

**Job Type:** Freelance / Contract (with potential for long-term work)



Examples for what kind of editing we are looking for:





---



 **About the Role**



We’re looking for a talented and detail-oriented video editor to create engaging long-form YouTube content focused on Formula 1. This role is ideal for someone who understands motorsport storytelling, pacing, and audience retention, and can bring race narratives to life through compelling edits and clean voiceover integration.



---



**Responsibilities**



* Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–20+ minutes) centered on Formula 1 topics (race breakdowns, driver stories, controversies, history, etc.)

* Sync and enhance voiceovers with visuals, music, and sound effects

* Source and incorporate relevant footage, images, and clips (within fair use guidelines)

* Add engaging elements such as subtitles, transitions, motion graphics, zooms, and overlays

* Maintain strong pacing and storytelling to maximize viewer retention

* Collaborate on creative direction, structure, and video concepts when needed

* Deliver high-quality videos on a consistent schedule



---



**Requirements**



* Proven experience editing YouTube content (portfolio required)

* Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, and retention strategies

* Familiarity with Formula 1 (teams, drivers, race format, current events)

* Proficiency in editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

* Ability to work with voiceovers and enhance audio quality

* Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines



---

* Passion for motorsports or sports content

* Experience editing documentary-style or commentary videos

* Knowledge of YouTube SEO and audience engagement tactics

* Thumbnail or basic graphic design skills



---



 **Compensation**



* Paid per video or monthly retainer (based on experience and workload)

* Opportunity for long-term collaboration and channel growth



---

Please include:



* Portfolio or links to previous work (preferably YouTube content)

* A brief introduction about your experience with video editing and Formula 1

* Your rates (per video or hourly)

* Your availability and turnaround time



Please fill out the form below:





---



We’re looking for someone who can turn great ideas into highly engaging content that keeps viewers watching until the very end. If you’re passionate about Formula 1 and YouTube storytelling, we’d love to work with you!

title: Industrial/Product Designer for Consumer Products - Full Time, Remote
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly creative Industrial Designer based in the Philippines to help define and evolve the visual identity of our product portfolio across high-end hair tools and power/home improvement tools.

This role focuses on product form, brand expression, CMF, and user experience. You will translate brand strategy into iconic, emotionally compelling physical products that stand out in competitive global markets.

From premium hair dryers to precision power tools, you will shape a cohesive and recognizable design language that defines who we are — while working closely with our product development team to ensure your vision is thoughtfully executed.

?

Responsibilities

• Lead the form development and aesthetic direction of new products across multiple categories.

• Create a distinctive and consistent design language that strengthens brand recognition.

• Explore concepts through sketching, form studies, ergonomic refinement, and 3D development.

• Develop thoughtful CMF (Color, Material, Finish) strategies aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure designs consider real-world functionality, usability, and internal component integration.

• Collaborate closely with the product development team to align on feasibility, performance requirements, and manufacturing considerations while maintaining design integrity.

• Produce high-quality renderings and presentation visuals to communicate design intent.

• Contribute to a cohesive product ecosystem across SKUs and categories.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong portfolio demonstrating brand-led product design, form exploration, and CMF expertise.

• Experience designing consumer products (beauty, electronics, tools, home goods, lifestyle products, etc.).

• Exceptional understanding of proportion, ergonomics, surface development, and user interaction.

• Ability to balance aesthetics, functionality, and manufacturability.

• Strong sketching skills (digital or hand).

• Proficiency in 3D modeling and rendering tools such as Rhino, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, KeyShot, or similar.

• Clear communication skills and experience collaborating with cross-functional teams.



What you'll get

Competitive Salary – Earn in USD!

Health Coverage (HMO) – Enjoy peace of mind after one year!

Paid Time Off – Because work-life balance matters!



How to Apply

Please submit your portfolio showcasing concept sketches, form development, CMF exploration, and final product renderings.

We’re looking for designers who create products people recognize instantly — before they even see the logo.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
About Us:

Dealer Lux specializes in creating innovative, lead-generating websites for spa and hearth dealers. We are a USA based company with clients all across North America. We integrate inventory management with dynamic marketing tools to drive customer engagement and boost sales. Our goal is to help dealers grow their digital presence through a seamless and feature-rich online experience.



Job Description:

Dealer Lux is looking for a dedicated SEO Specialist to help optimize our clients' websites and drive organic traffic. This role involves strategic content creation, technical SEO tasks, and daily collaboration with our Organic Marketing Specialist to support ongoing optimization initiatives. The ideal candidate should have strong SEO expertise, experience using SEMrush and WordPress, and the ability to handle multiple projects at once.



Key Responsibilities:

• Content creation such as blogs. Editing existing content.

• Technical optimizations (e.g., fixing 404 errors, media and schema data optimization).

• Usability/ADA compliance improvements.

• Optimizing title tags, meta descriptions, headings, alt text, internal linking, and structured data.

• Support off-page SEO efforts including Google Business Profile optimization, social media posting, backlink creation, and online directory management.

• Follow SOPs and work independently.

• Collaborate with the organic marketing team on ongoing SEO projects.



Requirements:

• Proven SEO experience, with a focus on content creation, technical SEO, and backlink strategies.

• Proficiency in WordPress and other SEO tools like SEMRush.

• Ability to manage multiple projects while staying within time constraints.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

• Comfortable asking questions to ensure understanding.

• Fluency in English. Candidates must be able to speak, read, and write English proficiently.



Preferred Qualifications:

• Prior experience managing part-time or freelance support teams.

• Knowledge of ADA compliance and website usability best practices.



Benefits:

• Flexible remote work environment

• Opportunities for professional growth

• Competitive salary

• Collaborative team culture



How to Apply:

Submit your resume, cover letter, and any relevant SEO case studies or portfolio work to us through Online Jobs messaging. To ensure you are a real person, please add the word "Octopus" somewhere into your application message. We look forward to your application!

title: Tier 2 Helpdesk Technician
description:
Position Summary



We are a small managed service provider (MSP) looking for a Helpdesk Technician who can own the full support lifecycle — from first-contact triage through advanced troubleshooting — across our client base. You’ll be the primary point of contact for end users, handling everything from password resets and printer issues to Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace administration, network diagnostics, and server-level troubleshooting. Because we’re a small team, you’ll wear many hats, work directly with clients, and have real impact on how we deliver service.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Front-Line Support



• Answer incoming calls,
s, and tickets; log all requests accurately in the PSA/ticketing system (Superops)

• Perform initial triage — gather symptoms, identify urgency, and resolve straightforward issues on first contact when possible

• Handle common requests: password resets, MFA setup, account unlocks, new-user onboarding/offboarding,
 and calendar issues, printer troubleshooting, and basic software installs

• Walk end users through solutions clearly and patiently, adapting communication style to non-technical audiences

Advanced Troubleshooting

• Troubleshoot complex workstation, laptop, and peripheral issues across Windows 10/11 and macOS environments

• Administer and maintain Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, Microsoft 365 tenants, and Group Policy across multiple client environments

• Diagnose network connectivity problems including DNS, DHCP, VPN, Wi-Fi, firewall rules, and switching/routing basics

• Support and maintain RMM tools (Superops) for monitoring, patching, and remote access

• Investigate recurring issues, perform root-cause analysis, and implement lasting fixes rather than repeated band-aids

• Support cloud platforms and SaaS applications common to the client base (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, line-of-business apps)



MSP Operations



• Manage and prioritize your own ticket queue across multiple clients, meeting or exceeding SLA response and resolution targets

• Create and maintain client-specific documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base articles in the company documentation platform (Hudu)

• Participate in onboarding new clients — inventorying assets, documenting environments, and setting up monitoring and management tools

• Coordinate with vendors and third-party providers when escalation beyond our scope is needed

• Assist with project work as needed: workstation deployments, migrations, network upgrades, and office moves

• Contribute to improving internal processes, automation, and service delivery quality



Required Qualifications



• Excellent English Language Skills, both written and verbal

• 2+ years of hands-on IT support experience; MSP experience strongly preferred

• Solid working knowledge of Windows 10/11, macOS, Microsoft 365 administration, and Active Directory / Azure AD

• Understanding of networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN, VLANs, and basic firewall concepts

• Experience with a PSA or ticketing system and an RMM platform

• Ability to manage multiple client environments and context-switch effectively throughout the day

• Strong communication skills — comfortable speaking directly with clients ranging from small business owners to office staff

• Self-motivated and able to work independently; you won’t always have someone looking over your shoulder



Preferred Qualifications



• Industry certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft 365 Certified

• Experience with endpoint management tools (Intune, Jamf)

• Familiarity with scripting or automation (PowerShell, Bash, or Python)

• Experience supporting backup and disaster recovery solutions (Datto, Veeam, Acronis)

• Exposure to basic security concepts: EDR tools,
 filtering, security awareness training platforms

title: Short-Form Video Editor (TikTok / Instagram)
description:
LuxNomads is a fast-growing global brand helping people relocate abroad and live a luxury, location-independent lifestyle.



We are hiring a Short-Form Video Editor to turn long-form talking videos into high-performing TikTok / Reels content.



This is NOT basic editing.

We are looking for someone who understands:

X hooks

X retention

X pacing

X storytelling



If you only know how to add captions and cut clips, this role is not for you.



 RESPONSIBILITIES

 • Edit 5 long-form videos per week into short-form clips

 • Cut videos into 90–120 second high-retention clips

 • Add:

 • Burned-in captions

 • Strong hooks in the first 3 seconds

 • Clean zoom cuts and pacing

 • Maintain a premium, clean style (not spammy TikTok edits)

 • Optimize videos for:

 • Retention

 • Clarity

 • Mobile viewing

 • Deliver edits within 24–48 hours



 CONTENT STYLE

 • Talking-head educational videos

 • Topics: relocation, visas, digital nomad lifestyle

 • Tone: confident, aspirational, premium



Think: Alex Hormozi meets luxury travel brand



WORKFLOW

 • You receive: 5 raw videos per week (5–7 minutes each)

 • You deliver: multiple short clips per video

 • Files organized via Google Drive

 • Communication via Slack or WhatsApp



REQUIREMENTS

 • Proven experience editing short-form content

 • Strong understanding of:

 • Hooks

 • Retention editing

 • Viral structure

 • Experience with TikTok / Instagram Reels formatting

 • Fast turnaround (24–48 hours)

 • Strong attention to detail



 BONUS

 • Experience with Metricool

 • Experience editing for personal brands

 • Ability to suggest better cuts or clip ideas



 IMPORTANT



DO NOT APPLY if:

 • You only do basic cuts and captions

 • You don’t understand retention or hooks

 • You cannot deliver within 48 hours



This is not basic editing. If you only know how to cut clips and add captions, do not apply.



We care about performance and consistency. Strong performers will receive raises and long-term work.

title: Hybrid Project Manager & Graphic Designer
description:
Overview

We are seeking a Hybrid Graphic Design Project Manager who can bridge the gap between organized project management and creative execution. You will be the primary point of contact for clients, turning their visions—specifically for projects like custom event bags—into high-quality visual reality.



Key Responsibilities

Client Management: Act as the main point of contact; manage expectations and maintain clear communication throughout the project lifecycle.



Creative Execution: Use your design expertise to create customized artwork tailored to specific client needs.



Project Oversight: Develop and manage timelines, budgets, and project plans to ensure on-time delivery.



Internal Coordination: Align with internal teams to ensure design objectives are met.



Quality Assurance: Perform rigorous checks on all deliverables to ensure they meet client specifications and brand standards.



Reporting: Prepare progress reports for stakeholders and proactively solve project bottlenecks.



Essential Qualifications

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Project Management, or a related field.



Software Mastery: Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) or Sketch.



Experience: 3–5 years in a PM role, ideally within a creative or design agency.



Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills for direct client interaction.



Organization: Proven ability to juggle multiple projects without losing track of details.



Salary & Benefits

Competitive Salary: Paid in U.S. Dollars ($); commensurate with your experience.



Health Benefits: Comprehensive health insurance package.



Future Security: Retirement savings plan with a company match.



Work-Life Balance: Paid time off (PTO), holidays, and a flexible hybrid work environment.



Growth: Professional development and training opportunities.

title: Crypto BD Partner - $10,000+ Potential in 90 Days
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: Real Estate Admin VA (Transaction/Listing Coordinator)
description:
Are you the detail-oriented, deadline-driven Real Estate Listing Coordinator we’ve been looking for?

We’re hiring a Remote Real Estate Listing Coordinator to support our U.S.-based real estate business. This is a work-from-home position where you’ll manage listings from onboarding to active status, ensure accuracy across platforms, and keep all listing-related tasks on track.



If you’re highly organized, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and enjoy keeping listings compliant and up to date, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Coordinate new listings from onboarding through activation and updates.

- Enter, manage, and update listings in MLS and other listing platforms.

- Collect, organize, and maintain listing documents, disclosures, and property details.

- Coordinate with agents, sellers, photographers, and vendors.

- Track listing deadlines and ensure compliance with MLS and brokerage requirements.

- Make price changes, status updates, and listing revisions as needed.

- Maintain accurate records and communicate listing updates to the team.



What We’re Looking For:

- Prior experience as a Real Estate Listing Coordinator that worked for A US Real Estate company is a MUST.

- Familiarity with MLS systems and real estate listing workflows.

- Fluent in spoken & written English (must keep up with natural conversation).

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

- Tech-savvy and comfortable working across multiple tools and platforms.

- Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision.



What You’ll Gain:

- A long-term, remote role with stable workload.

- Opportunity to work closely with a U.S.-based real estate team.

- Hands-on experience managing real estate listings end-to-end.

- Meaningful work where your accuracy and organization directly impact success.



Apply Now:

*Ability to work with a team directly in edit sessions to assess needs and meet project requirements.

*Properly maintain a digital archive

*Possess a strong attention to detail and time managements skills, and be an organized team player

*Have experience working in a fast-paced environment on weekly deadlines

*Demonstrate a solid typing WPM (ideally 45 wpm+)

*provide their own video and audio equipment



Job responsibilities include:

*Advise and coach the team on lighting, audio and video requirements  to ensure quality footage for use in post-production

*Manage our podcast production schedule for Rosie Radio, including managing workflow; and capture, editing, and uploading of podcasts to various online channels (iTunes [Libsyn], YouTube, blog, etc)

*Play a highly collaborative creative role in structuring new ideas and managing production projects to completion

*Edit online content for YouTube and 
, including podcast episodes, storytelling videos, and how-to videos

*Create and produce marketing videos and PR videos, as needed

*Sourcing photos, stock video and audio as needed for projects

*Create all multimedia content for social (audio / video / design)

*Edit and upload footage and maintain video logs and media storage

*Create motion graphics for video

*Design online / social graphics for various projects



Qualifications

*Well-versed in Adobe Premiere, along with the rest of Adobe CC software (After Effects, Photoshop, etc)

*Experience creating media for social and the web

*Experience in storytelling via videography

*Knowledge of video codecs and encoding software

*Expertise with multicam editing

*A strong understanding of editing workflows and file structuring

*Ability to color correct and mix audio

*Knowledge and experience with video lighting and basic set setup



Tech Requirements:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Need to have professional editing software (Licensed Adobe Premiere)



Work core hours are from Sunday - Thursday 3PM - 7PM CST // Monday - Friday 5AM - 9AM PH Time



This is a PART-TIME role with a salary range of PHP28,000 -38,000 monthly,  



Application Instruction:

Fill out this form: 

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Senior Non-QM Mortgage Underwriter (Remote | Night Shift)
description:
Senior Non-QM Mortgage Underwriter (Remote | Night Shift)

Php 70,000 – Php 188,179/month (based on experience)

Full-Time | Permanent Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company



>Why This Role is Different



We’re not looking for a basic underwriter.



We’re hiring someone who can confidently review and approve complex Non-QM loans — someone who understands risk, moves fast, and knows how to make solid credit decisions.



If you have strong Non-QM experience and want to work directly with a growing U.S.-based mortgage team, this is a long-term opportunity with real impact.



> What You’ll Be Doing



Underwrite Non-QM loans (DSCR, Bank Statement, WVOE, P&L)



Analyze credit, income, assets, and collateral



Review AUS findings and apply conditions or overlays



Issue decisions: Approve, Deny, or Suspend



Work closely with processors and operations to clear conditions



Maintain strong turn times while ensuring compliance



Support junior tea
mbers when needed



> What We’re Looking For



At least 5 years U.S. mortgage underwriting experience



Strong Non-QM experience (DSCR, Bank Statement, etc.)



Experience handling self-employed borrowers and complex files



Solid understanding of U.S. mortgage guidelines (TRID, ATR/QM, etc.)



Able to make independent credit decisions



Detail-oriented and reliable in a remote setup



Plus (but not required):



Experience with Encompass



Korean, Chinese, or Vietnamese language skills



> Work Setup



Remote (Work from Home)



Night Shift: 11:30 PM – 8:30 AM PH Time



Stable, long-term role with a U.S.-based company



> Basic Requirements



At least 16GB RAM



Intel i5 (4th gen or newer) or equivalent



Stable internet (minimum 100 Mbps)



>> How to Apply



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions below carefully:



1. Submit Your Application via OLJ



Include the following in your application message:



Updated Resume (PDF or link — Google Drive/Dropbox/OLJ profile)

If submitting a link, make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view”



Years of U.S. Mortgage Underwriting Experience



Years of Non-QM Experience (DSCR, Bank Statement, etc.)



Expected Monthly Salary (PHP)



Earliest Start Date / Availability



2. Answer This Question (Required)



In your application message, briefly answer:



What are the three main documents you review when underwriting a DSCR loan?



(Keep your answer short and direct.)



3. Important



To confirm you have read the job post, please include this line at the beginning of your message:



“I have Non-QM underwriting experience.”



4. For Shortlisted Candidates Only



If you are shortlisted, you will be asked to complete a quick follow-up step, which includes:



Internet speed test (screenshot from speedtest.net)



Computer specifications (RAM and processor)



Short Non-QM scenario-based questions



>> Note



Only applicants who follow the instructions above will be prioritized for review.



>> Shortlisted Candidates



Qualified applicants will be invited to complete a short screening step, which may include:



Quick technical questions (Non-QM / DSCR)



Speedtest and computer specs



Brief experience validation



>> Final Note



We’re looking for serious underwriters who know how to assess risk and make confident decisions.



If that’s you, apply now — we review applications daily.

title: Seeking Experts for Feedback:Bilingual Parents, and Sport Enthusiasts (Basketball Book Focus)
description:
Looking for Beta Readers: "The Inspiring Basketball Stories For Kids"



Hello!!!



We’re a growing educational publishing team at Petite Dreamer, creating "human-crafted," engaging books for children—especially those in multilingual and multicultural families who may find traditional books boring. Right now, we’re looking for thoughtful experts and beta readers to provide detailed feedback on our newest title: "The Inspiring Basketball Stories For Kids: 24 Epic Tales of Grit".



We are especially interested in those with a passion for basketball, any sports and personal or professional experience in coaching, sports education, or children's literature.



???? About the Book:



Beyond the Stats: Unlike typical sports books that focus on dry numbers, this book focuses on "Grit"—the failures, heartbreaks, and the "4 AM" workouts that make a champion.



Epic Tales of Grit: Features 24 stories of basketball G.O.A.T.s, including Kobe Bryant’s "Mamba Mentality," Larry Bird’s early morning repetitions, and Michael Jordan's "Breakfast Club".



Engaging Format: Includes 100+ facts, trivia, "Grit Checks," and interactive quizzes designed to grab the attention of reluctant readers.



Multilingual Support: Written to support bilingual/multilingual households and encourage "Future Legends" at home.



???? We’re looking for someone who:



Has experience writing professional feedback or editorial content for children's books.



Can provide constructive insights that resonate with parents, educators, and young sports fans.



Understands the value of resilience-based non-fiction for kids.



Has experience as a teacher, bilingual parent, or a deep background in the Sport(basketball,Football) niche (coach, player, or super-fan).



? Bonus if you:



Have personal experience teaching or parenting bilingual children.



Have written or edited children’s sports books or educational non-fiction.



Are familiar with the "Mamba Mentality" or the history of SPort, basketball, Football(NFL) legends.



???? What You’ll Get:



A full PDF copy of the book in advance.



An opportunity to join our growing team of collaborators (with potential future projects across stories, facts, trivia books, and more).



How to Apply:

Please send a brief summary of your experience with Sport, basketball and children’s education/literature. Mention if you are a bilingual parent or educator!

title: Maintenance/Operations Manager (Real Estate & Construction)
description:
Please send a voice introduction to be considered.



Overview:



I’m looking for a highly organized Virtual Assistant to help manage day-to-day operations, maintenance, and construction coordination for several rental properties. The ideal candidate has a strong background in property management or bookkeeping, combined with hands-on experience working directly with general contractors and tradespeople. You will be the central hub keeping finances, utilities, vendor relationships, project bids, and documents organized with minimal supervision.



Responsibilities:



*Contractor & Maintenance Coordination: Act as the primary liaison with general contractors, subcontractors, and handymen to request bids, schedule repairs, and track timelines for routine maintenance, unit turnovers, and renovation projects.



*Expense & Project Tracking: Track and categorize expenses per property, accurately separating routine maintenance costs     from capital expenditure (CapEx) construction projects.



*Document Management: Organize receipts, contractor invoices, lien waivers, and financial documents for taxes and refinancing. Collect and file contractor compliance documents (W-9s, COIs/insurance certificates, contracts).



*Financial Operations: Pay utility bills, keep property accounts current, and maintain simple monthly P&Ls and project budget trackers in Google Sheets.



*Reporting: Provide weekly summaries of cash flow, upcoming bills, construction/renovation progress, and immediate maintenance priorities.



Requirements:



*Experience in property management, bookkeeping, or construction administration.



*Proven experience working with and coordinating contractors, vendors, and maintenance teams.



*Familiarity with basic construction, renovation, and maintenance terminology.



*Strong English communication skills (written and spoken) to effectively negotiate and follow up with vendors.



*Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple projects at once.



*Proficient with Google Sheets and QuickBooks.

title: AI Content Writer for NY Digital Marketing Agency  Remote | Philippines | Must Work USA EST Hours
description:
New York-based digital marketing agency looking for an AI-savvy Content Writer and Marketing Assistant who can work during USA Eastern Time business hours.



We work with clients in:



Home improvement

Medical and aesthetic

Hospitality and events

Local service businesses



We need someone who can use AI tools intelligently, not lazily.



That means you know how to turn rough ideas into strong content, use AI to speed up research and drafting, and then refine everything so it sounds natural, strategic, and conversion-focused.



This role is for someone who understands that good marketing content is not just writing. It is about clarity, trust, structure, SEO, and lead generation.



What You Will Be Doing



Writing and editing website pages, service pages, blog posts, landing pages,
 campaigns, social captions, ad copy, and marketing content



Using tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Grammarly, and similar tools to assist with outlining, rewriting, content development, and research



Turning voice notes, rough drafts, bullet points, and client input into polished marketing content



Writing SEO-friendly content for local businesses in industries like home services, healthcare, aesthetics, and hospitality



Reviewing AI-generated content and improving it so it feels human, clear, persuasive, and brand-appropriate



Proofreading, fact-checking, and tightening copy before it is delivered



Helping organize content files, revisions, and production workflows



Collaborating with our internal team during USA EST hours



Who We Are Looking For



You write excellent English



You are comfortable using AI tools every day



You know how to prompt well and improve weak output



You can write in different tones depending on the client and industry



You understand marketing and are not just a generic article writer



You are dependable, organized, responsive, and can meet deadlines



You are comfortable working during Eastern USA time hours



Required Skills



Strong written English



Experience in content writing, copywriting, SEO writing, or digital marketing



Practical experience using AI tools for content creation and workflow support



Ability to write website copy, blogs, social content, and
 marketing content



Ability to self-edit and improve clarity, grammar, structure, and marketing effectiveness



Strong attention to detail



Reliable internet and work setup



Availability during EST working hours



Preferred Experience



Writing for home improvement businesses such as plumbing, HVAC, roofing, remodeling, or electrical



Writing for medical, med spa, dental, dermatology, or concierge medicine brands



Writing for hospitality businesses such as hotels, venues, restaurants, or events



Basic understanding of local SEO, keyword structure, headings, title tags, and search intent



Experience with WordPress, Google Docs, ClickUp, Basecamp, Trello, or similar systems



Important



This is not for people who simply copy and paste AI output.



We are looking for someone who can use AI as a competitive advantage while still applying human thinking, editing, structure, quality control, and marketing judgment.



If your content sounds robotic, repetitive, vague, or generic, you will not succeed in this role.



Schedule



You must be able to work during USA EST hours.



Please do not apply if you are only available for a few random overlap hours. We need someone dependable during our core workday.



Compensation



Please include your expected monthly salary or hourly rate based on your experience.



How To Apply



Please send:



Your resume



A short paragraph about your experience



Three relevant writing samples



A list of AI tools you use regularly



Your available working hours in EST



Your expected salary



In the first line of your application, write: Ready for EST Content Excellence



Also, include the word Buffalo somewhere naturally in your application so we know you read the full job post carefully.

title: Graphics Designer/Content Creator
description:
Graphic Designer Job Responsibilities:

Prepares visual presentations by designing art and copy layouts.



Graphic Designer Job Duties:

Prepares work to be accomplished by gathering information and materials.

Plans concept by studying information and materials.

Illustrates concept by designing a rough layout of art and copy regarding arrangement, size, type size and style, and related aesthetic concepts.

Also, create content for social media platforms.

Create mockups for all the pages of the website to guide the technical person to develop the site.

Obtains approval of concept by submitting a rough layout for approval.

Prepares final layout by marking and pasting up finished copy and art.

Ensures operation of equipment by completing preventive maintenance requirements; following manufacturer's instructions; troubleshooting malfunctions; calling for repairs; maintaining equipment inventories; evaluating new 
pletes projects by coordinating with outside agencies, art services, printers, etc.

Maintains technical knowledge by attending design workshops; reviewing professional publications; participating in professional societies.

10PM - 7AM PST (7 AM ? 10 PM PH time)
